| | **This robot wasn’t supposed to do THAT...**
---
| [ Get the Details ](https://links.main.yourcapitalminds.com/u/click?_t=affa6bfca09a497f86454ba803e6a9a2&_m=9086d4c95f5b452e80f7fc7996221c6d&_e=KmgjlxjcPjIVgdLObQP0hGqxXJH_OldF5PeZ2lbUW8HpvXDMLpO_ai58tCiQsOaLAxFiXeSn87UjXCAi4VQBrZs4RLzn_i4JYBqnTur964vlEPCErOW-vr7cTPqKO8Am0NKjgZFaZ_TSJ5VU2-l-FH-nxdhpVrZUzjItmDVzyDLdKAxvauo3cebh88GcC4Kbh1MjzYjvR7NfmYmDk6-y3V4rjwwvMYlq7hsGBu4_vSDjp-RuooG_15xSqbj82J3ddkx3Qohqd3NhUCzfGos79It00brS_qiIzLKXFwycQP_b60R9X57VHOyPPiIfoXOnWMl0bWzSIR6hgrIKMR4EPFJJ05PFCQaDWhw4fc9I9HGdPTJ7uRZUr-J8SVc71pBB5uvNrIwVYgNv9PenuSUPu0wUUfAQ7G8EA0uwwevBMyomx1Vh-dOY5nJcOheHOSPU_EuuXoQo0ouxsAPYEg7oGe8NCJkb8ww2DeqkhJ8R2CfjNn-cx3TMoDA8UoPeKv30Doca1BqD4dSCyfxa1F7aA59NcX8gzsErLUz8lLmak2RXOMB4Fomd828zeroT7rWsprdNgqHun9OZzqPspxIryw%3D%3D)
---
| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

This was **raw, real, and absolutely insane** — the moment a robot did something no one thought was possible... and it was all caught on camera.

Engineers freaked out.

And behind this “impossible” footage?

[A $7 company](https://links.main.yourcapitalminds.com/u/click?_t=affa6bfca09a497f86454ba803e6a9a2&_m=9086d4c95f5b452e80f7fc7996221c6d&_e=KmgjlxjcPjIVgdLObQP0hGqxXJH_OldF5PeZ2lbUW8HpvXDMLpO_ai58tCiQsOaLAxFiXeSn87UjXCAi4VQBrZs4RLzn_i4JYBqnTur964vlEPCErOW-vr7cTPqKO8Am0NKjgZFaZ_TSJ5VU2-l-FH-nxdhpVrZUzjItmDVzyDLdKAxvauo3cebh88GcC4KbgS0oJ8BcR-X54Rd0gK-CYKk0rkOuZbnxysuzWbYP0t9GFZBxnC6-n4d1A3Rp1Gw5NWvVElYCssyqQkHtCqavZQi4n_jJbQmRFH5ikkPdMul2Du4ziTWbxCEE34jfBwzC6jJ5-hY4ApIqkcOiiyI2zSwj-IrFyhyvAntQBQ_3xo6AWeiP8wOlkj-bpvlUVP8Oo4dKmOh9zXV2YEy9disD6SNrP92Zp3bx4IK49_fVdb8N7-GtoigOad0adzcFt6FcnxrRSLJ_ovGueE9GqhwnEeQmcyKo8RB8KelmbVC-zg3Xh_C3AeWJPuD7yJlSde2XV_uvhpHYzpuQ1K6YzugxdcFCJVpT3qhxBmJOFZ9V3Tyoc85bIwYUGfNSMZr1YETYilLtmfyZ3z_I_rfC37ZH-A%3D%3D) quietly providing the sensors, vision systems, and AI “instincts” that make these machines _think_.

Nvidia didn’t just partner with them — Nvidia is [betting the future of a trillion‐dollar robotics empire](https://links.main.yourcapitalminds.com/u/click?_t=affa6bfca09a497f86454ba803e6a9a2&_m=9086d4c95f5b452e80f7fc7996221c6d&_e=KmgjlxjcPjIVgdLObQP0hGqxXJH_OldF5PeZ2lbUW8HpvXDMLpO_ai58tCiQsOaLAxFiXeSn87UjXCAi4VQBrZs4RLzn_i4JYBqnTur964vlEPCErOW-vr7cTPqKO8Am0NKjgZFaZ_TSJ5VU2-l-FH-nxdhpVrZUzjItmDVzyDLdKAxvauo3cebh88GcC4Kbyi580KhxE4mLuJ-uokFLVW3JQVOIH7RYy8ky2gUbZIgkjkYBnnDrdREpfCf97Y0k40DmM0mzKX6bl9ibz9OoTe63uZnLXou9BMTAgw4PHtYpeiaP1-4D_kGiw2yollCOdkDKnKWFIODpoyN4vJZJ8fnxoPA4YMOxaM3P8zxFmN_8zRwEnZd8jAQAJj8JWKwnrd0o6vvW0IqjrwviO-UPwwmpDb1nO1QJKyGZ5R4KLseopNvoWl2AtIHNcUyknVVqJx_0GD4HQjnFGNGZCOOmpYJLgV14silvg_pWW2qyVpu8qdxFY8W4tM3kaBmbAPqhDEyN63Hsfa-mv3TE0EPvfJlSvpTMzK3eBA2uEO1KaPdb1af1Xo8RFx0_GgJMs4V2JXz1xndzrefq4xeNIUdjZg%3D%3D) on this company’s tech.

[Get the details on the $7 stock NOW](https://links.main.yourcapitalminds.com/u/click?_t=affa6bfca09a497f86454ba803e6a9a2&_m=9086d4c95f5b452e80f7fc7996221c6d&_e=KmgjlxjcPjIVgdLObQP0hGqxXJH_OldF5PeZ2lbUW8HpvXDMLpO_ai58tCiQsOaLAxFiXeSn87UjXCAi4VQBrZs4RLzn_i4JYBqnTur964vlEPCErOW-vr7cTPqKO8Am0NKjgZFaZ_TSJ5VU2-l-FH-nxdhpVrZUzjItmDVzyDLdKAxvauo3cebh88GcC4KbXCBIKBaYKtMfllgqvoaRt_a4J990Dy68FuJL8yuwCpJN1J2qX7EJhvxMi-3AxhTGH89kKpxQJWUk9M7QsYly4GVkPFY4Ika9q0Je5TePve_o4B03eGT4z4qGuM1YJ97URCoy6Bve23kxsOsxetjgrhrCvEVglpCY4rxbEe6rMzGXKVZBKlxwMqefBmrkHP-hjXfVtDasRNLOeXeJrwmff4IevPzsjJGcMXH4gPE9V9TX29BJUhNWeHMOfBA6DYRu0XSWwOPcOk6XZixrErefZVooB6s1mhQDLU2hpAROQFtLEgFJj_KfTOuy7OUKu2vruxS78GStjx2LBxZe6qf5vmZhuZWybzOwlLiB1YNmTEIWkvlHQhxhRr4q65sA9EPMtKsyXeBAI536ZBxhx7JICA%3D%3D)
Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

clean_body: This was raw, real, and absolutely insane — the moment a robot did something no one thought was possible...| | | | January 02 | | | | | This robot wasn’t supposed to do THAT... | | | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him. clean_body: We’d like to submit your response to Trump before end of year! | | | | What’s your current level of satisfaction with President Donald Trump? A. 100% B. 75% C. 50% D. 25% Hi, It’s Team Trump. Now that 2025 is coming to a close we’re requesting that EVERYONE WHO VOTED FOR TRUMP in 2016, 2020, and/or 2024 kindly respond before the end of the business day! We’d personally give President Trump an A + but we need to hear from you. If you respond ASAP, we’ll even give you the opportunity to leave a note for President Trump that we’ll hand-deliver to him! Thank you for your swift response! Together, we will make America greater than anyone's ever seen. name: Steve Scalise
subject: I am sorry Really I am
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I completely understand how you feel because I would feel the same way.

I am genuinely sorry, Friend.
Really, I am.
I am sorry some folks threaten to remove you from the GOP if you don't donate.
I am sorry some folks masquerade as President Trump to try and fool you.
I am sorry some folks don't even thank you for donating.
It is enough to drive you nuts. And I completely understand how you feel because I get the same messages. I'll get bombarded with texts and emails asking me for money but it's hard to tell who sends them all.
And if I do pitch in a few bucks, I'd probably get pestered even more - without any acknowledgement of my contribution.
It's wrong, and I'm doing things differently.
This is Steve Scalise. First of all, I want to personally thank you for everything you've done to help elect President Trump and Republicans thus far. [You are the lifeblood of the MAGA movement - and we only won with your hard work and support.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zth68lh35vf9uic8abb8d52br36o99g5t0vl4e30_rp22sh2s8i6eor7cpge0ob4c3h2bs)
Thank you for having the grit and determination to stand up to the Democrat Machine at the height of its power.
Unfortunately, the Democrats have regrouped faster than anyone thought possible.
They're ALREADY unloading 50 million dollars into enough battleground districts to flip the House. They're ALREADY dragging President Trump into court.
[In other words, we really need some more support right now to keep fighting.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi27lc2n81vrr3l16n9t7t7f3oh27qnhlchpud10_rp22sh2s8i6eor7cpge0ob4c3h2bs)
If you can't afford to pitch right now, that's okay. I won't hold it against you. Take care of your family first. I won't question your Party loyalty or shame you for not donating.
BUT if you can contribute - even if it's just a few bucks - it would go a long way. Especially right now.
We have no choice but to hit our upcoming fundraising goal. Because if we fail, the Democrat Machine will crush us in every battleground district, barge back into power, and effectively BLOCKADE President Trump's entire legislative agenda.
[So I am sorry I even have to ask you this, but can you please pitch in before our BIGGEST deadline of the year?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs1vudjoagqiala87rcu78ubsdkc0ui81fc521do_rp22sh2s8i6eor7cpge0ob4c3h2bs)
It would mean a great deal to me personally if you'd be willing to help.[IF YOU CAN, PLEASE PITCH IN HERE
](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z39ijoa2k4nc6q5dkl0he22silbhg9bms5n3lh88_rp22sh2s8i6eor7cpge0ob4c3h2bs)Either way, thanks for all you do. I mean that from the bottom of my heart.
God bless you, - Steve
STEVE SCALISEHouse Majority Leader

* * *
MAJOR DEVELOPMENT _MAGA Warriors Brooke Rollins, Pete Hegseth, and Kristi Noem unveiled their plan to RECLAIM AMERICA 'S HEARTLAND from Communist China._
FIRST: Chinese nationals bought up hundreds of thousands of acres of our land. THEN: Joe Biden filed LEGAL ACTION to let them purchase even more. NOW: Republicans are leading the way to take back our land![](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf4ibdr9kqkkt0h91upd1esv6julfg0v4setngq0_rp22sh2s8i6eor7cpge0ob4c3h2bs)[Sign our petition right here and right now to force Chinese nationals to liquidate all U.S. land and help Republicans save America's heartland!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh8besh87gr244ttmot9d8u44lpdg8p98du7nhug_rp22sh2s8i6eor7cpge0ob4c3h2bs)[SIGN THE PETITION
](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjlqahqiett4bqmpc7g0h9arhid4fgek2cg3egk0_rp22sh2s8i6eor7cpge0ob4c3h2bs) | |

name: TPUSA Faith
subject: Happy New Year
body:
As we celebrate the Christmas season, our hearts return to this incredible truth: the Word became flesh. The God who spoke creation into existence stepped into our world, not as an idea or as fully God, but as a person.
| [ ](https://d1K2-504.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DN+113/d1K2-504/VX7hDP8dKflsW8z_8fJ7jx628W6WXg815HRcpFN8BHR5W3m2nnW6N1vHY6lZ3kBVdL4454LZrK1VR5NLp6xVCtxVh9SY24tF0BmW7NHDSX9bqQf6W7gs7Lh4vsQQTN1d5zTQXzhtPW2J54Ml4w2h9QW2SH_-G1S21JSW2z4_lK2gWCwlVkWHyZ5nHNLhW4Xkcmy26bgcjW69Cxn83g65d0W1VhnyD9kw8v2VgBYBf4zhfQCN5jMVyz_sgHRW4TPfQg5WDr9hW2GKp811Dw2_bW5jG42Q7CZN1KW6z1d_39c9BZHW4H4b292hfFyKW19Zwb539-ND0W1vrt5n8YxTGpf7rjWqd04)
---
Dear Peter, As we start a new year, we reflect on God’s faithfulness throughout the last one. Looking ahead, we have hope because God declares that He makes all things new (Revelation 21:5). He is always faithful and His love endures forever. Scripture reminds us again and again that God is at work in our lives, offering restoration and renewal. No matter what you have experienced, what choices you have made, or where you are in your relationship with Christ, there is always a chance to repent and start anew. In Him, we are a “new creation” (2 Corinthians 5:17), and His Spirit is constantly making a way in places that feel impossible (Isaiah 43:19). Our prayer for you in the coming year is that you would encounter the Word in a fresh and personal way. May you experience the living Word as the one who speaks, transforms, and renews. May He fill your home with peace, turn confusion into clarity, and breathe hope into every part of the year ahead. May His voice guide you, His truth steady you, and His presence remind you that He is still speaking and still changing lives today. If, in this new year, you are committing to return to church or are looking for a new church home, we would love to serve you here! Use the button below to explore our newly launched Church Map to help you find a church in your area. If no church is nearby, feel free to email [faith@tpusa.com](mailto:faith@tpusa.com), and we will connect you with a local representative.
---
[ ](https://d1K2-504.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DN+113/d1K2-504/VX7hDP8dKflsW8z_8fJ7jx628W6WXg815HRcpFN8BHR5W3m2nnW6N1vHY6lZ3mdW3X8r0Z6f4BryW8tlc5X8pnYcmW2nZT2c1CNKtBW86WwFF9ftgDDW8QKBBl7SLbtxW75jN-v8V9MVHN6H8FSvgZX4cN4gV7Zv2H_vtW7HFY8-5g9gZlW6thQ043htkdVW6TPtHw7CYNVfW7GYd7h1XNY-hW55Fh0r1JQKQ0W1sjnJd22n6VsV7txcK6wHjKNW4-lMDF3kVvstW94CMcB7HsrnvW1xdfN35V3bzYN8knTg7YFt4QW2sPwFJ2CkQScN70hv8wH5T7sW2LF4y-5LbbMkf8bzGCH04)
---
Also, we’ve created a New Year’s wallpaper for your phone. Let it serve as a simple reminder that God is renewing, restoring, and leading you forward in the days, weeks, and the new year ahead.

---
[ ](https://d1K2-504.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DN+113/d1K2-504/VX7hDP8dKflsW8z_8fJ7jx628W6WXg815HRcpFN8BHR6P3m2nnW8wLKSR6lZ3nlMQ70KVQcgftW8zQ0pb1-9LtlW8LcCJQ8N792wW1KBpyY8XVs0JVqXytY5RzYh8N18fmgV96f5lV72m4G7TjSvdW24V8gz3HppJCW15NQcn7KXxFpW7-tH7f8ZJhDwN3lgPrYSRNbQW3Mv3Qk2WS7TCW4b_wjg8SHZYLW6zZ2n_59-dlZW16L-Wl4V-y6PW8TzLwv7qVR1qN1VcRVzKxrTvW41ZyKj1PkcXfW5dVhSg4pyQs_W4hzdjV1DgyK2W64tr-25kyPPyW7vqYCv97DzGVW4CVJJY2rv2MxW31Fbx96XHdRMW6WqfHc84ZxF7N8ZstyJSyXbpW7bzZPG25b0hMW7rccDq90YsStf5h8_8d04)
---
Wishing you a blessed and joy-filled New Year, TPUSA Faith
---
[ ](https://d1K2-504.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DN+113/d1K2-504/VX7hDP8dKflsW8z_8fJ7jx628W6WXg815HRcpFN8BHR5W3m2nnW6N1vHY6lZ3mWW3fHvPK7kNJ0NW7CFvPZ3nt-PbW8-VyX71FVWz4W2R30mm5XL9HSW5JfgCw5j80Q2W1fFpyJ7llsXTW2m1PzJ28LM7lW1ksrBp8Q7jX-W7yGWhd1M564CW1j7yg67b1Y1BW1lLg8_7Yww56W3Kskk164CqFnW2szdN-6xrvV1W403ngY4GHfC0W1CxRWw6xX8W9W2XYn196bNKf9W5Wd9wh5gppc-W5LJfg245TtZpN6ZNZhjfJsNFW6QGKy58s9mT0W1tsbHj11B5xyW3DSfhG76NNWLf5p4lLT04)

name: Josh Schoemann
subject: Thank You!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Schoemann for Governor
body:
| | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/joshschoemann/schoemann-grassroots-committee-zoom-call-tuesday-may-13-at-730pm-18169305?e=1e7d561942)
---
| | |
---
| Hi -

This will be a short email. _**I just wanted to say thank you to each and every one of you.**_ I know I've been asking for money a lot recently -- trust me, I understand how overwhelming it can feel. The unfortunate reality is that is just a part of running for office these days. But _**your support is critical to funding our campaign and getting Wisconsin back on the right track.**_

So once again, thank you. _**If you've donated to our campaign -- thank you! If you've volunteered and walked in a parade with us -- thank you! And if you've talked to your friends and relatives about our campaign -- thank you!**_

Wishing a blessed and bountiful new year for you and your loved ones.

I'll see you out there.
---
| | |
---
| Josh Schoemann

| | Dear Fellow American,

America's story is written not just in ink -- but in the stone, soil, and battlefields where freedom was born.

Yet today, too many of America's sacred places have been captured by the radical Left. Leftist radicals use them to indoctrinate unsuspecting citizens and tell a false version of American history.

That's why The Heritage Foundation created _**The Heritage Guide to Historic Sites**_ -- a free, digital resource featuring **45 historic locations** across the United States that tell the true story of America through the places where it happened.

Each site is carefully reviewed for historical accuracy, rated from **A to C** , so you can know which tours tell the truth -- and which distort it.

From Independence Hall to Jamestown, from Mount Vernon to Yorktown, this guide helps patriotic Americans reconnect with our founding ideals and preserve them for the next generation.

Access your free guide at the link below:

[https://secured.heritage.org/digital-guide-to-the-most-historic-sites/](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/lpeMip7EX1hBTKI_KGDX8FHbU9sSB15Li0M3V1MPSZN6r3gXGQN99_pE7uHzuXjMIY4H4_9p-kyKFB2wjxFB_evFRdBwo3wClrCDHvmf3pLfneknEJHZ2uknC-8-a16kUrf2PlH8v0WfS6NPJ06iEhm57rjGMgisccqukga9C2_5ZtWH0njf2lFBczPk5LciDJ1P5tRoHthsS082Gkzg3JZutRlU8disxc_1ljWS1iVZ18_nOMLzN_hekuPi1TZDj_oSfBjLNJ0YyVeYvK8U8SFdSCc5fVevg0JkuQcT-u08vDxOKZeVgH57P02YyRuzwgvasi-6ec1MGATpp0Fl9y83q71_KhrK-CBGeVBOBAGvY_1RkOiklVCxOUuWW7VgEVRAG2E1842RgoV4U8pRyWIGtHHtmq1CoA3SAyik4rDTi10W-ujWl3wtHqg4agw7kaDmNf7A5OxJvBDS8HWY_31AT5V_b5nP5V8EJQmA_MWusUrJbxJu2KHl9KVBtLbIMycWHahcqjgMBOls0Kyd_RVDPrWHv0TIIUCmrkcRoZS8B7Q7nLb_an6xcPS9Ondzqqybni5VcGYAJr_WnVIQgOGGWajqHdPRwT7MVuqTjQRmHtFtRzclp_DRGzVGfGkxEp1pCi_MfaiEhy86RqHSuE5NmtutNNKhkEzv2rrMKT1mK8QjpnEw0D_oAxDm-tS2Fxb8gmYQZVL5_383M5BRvnx_o5OcTW2tEpgenFisWuIF/oujoj98dcL7acJ5rGE75jlUG9Ca6YLPF/16)

name: Wesley Bell
subject: Happy New Year, and a thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
body:
St. Louis is my home, and I'm proud to represent our great city in our nation's capital and to fight for the liberties and freedoms that were promised to We The People. Happy New Year, Peter!

**2026 brings us new challenges and new opportunities, but one thing I'm certain of heading into this election year is that I'm grateful you're by my side.**

St. Louis is my home. I'm proud to represent our great city in our nation's capital and to fight to bring home the investments working families deserve.

Before we fully look forward, I want to look back at how we got to this moment. Donald Trump spent 2025 deliberately dismantling the institutions we believed to be untouchable. He's warped the presidential seat to cozy up to foreign interests, attack free speech, gut affordable healthcare access, and roll back essential environmental protections.

Prices have not gone down. In fact, they've continued to climb and squeeze working families for every penny. People are losing their health insurance coverage, Social Security is once again on the chopping block, and our nation feels more divided than ever before. If this is Trump's American Dream, _we want no part in it._

Already, the 2026 House Forecast predicts Democrats have a 62 percent chance of flipping the House blue in November. I'm determined to make that happen and to end Trump's grip on our democracy once and for all.

Thank you again for being with me in this fight, and thank you to everyone who chipped in ahead of our FEC end-of-year deadline. Reaching our goal was just the first step in many down the road to Election Day.

When we fight, we win, so let's keep pressing forward.

In solidarity,

Wesley | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122525035/592758420/-250409404?refcode=em25_260102_eoyty_enask_gq_act___wb_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_260102_eoyty_enask_gq_act___wb_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=c4e91231-ebe7-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzODkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzRlOTEyMzEtZWJlNy1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zJGmHe4zV6TMkEa5w_xxU52m8Xm8n1XTkgACv2w1NMg=)

Happy New Year, Peter! 2026 brings us new challenges and new opportunities, but one thing I'm certain of heading into this election year is that I'm grateful you're by my side. St. Louis is my home. I'm proud to represent our great city in our nation's capital and to fight to bring home the investments working families deserve. Before we fully look forward, I want to look back at how we got to this moment. Donald Trump spent 2025 deliberately dismantling the institutions we believed to be untouchable. He's warped the presidential seat to cozy up to foreign interests, attack free speech, gut affordable healthcare access, and roll back essential environmental protections. Prices have not gone down. In fact, they've continued to climb and squeeze working families for every penny. People are losing their health insurance coverage, Social Security is once again on the chopping block, and our nation feels more divided than ever before. If this is Trump's American Dream, we want no part in it. Already, the 2026 House Forecast predicts Democrats have a 62 percent chance of flipping the House blue in November. I'm determined to make that happen and to end Trump's grip on our democracy once and for all. Thank you again for being with me in this fight, and thank you to everyone who chipped in ahead of our FEC end-of-year deadline. Reaching our goal was just the first step in many down the road to Election Day. When we fight, we win, so let's keep pressing forward. In solidarity, Wesley | = = PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI PO Box 190669, ST LOUIS, MO 63119

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: This isn't a hoax
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
I’m appalled... **Donald Trump just called the affordability crisis a "hoax."** [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122526347/592762518/164382108?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.01.02_Combatting-Affordability-Crisis_B1_F1_S1_C1_90AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjYxNTZiYi1lYmU3LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HRQCz00cyTzPId585Y8XpmbblMc_mV07U99kTH_NBeE=) → Tell that to the families choosing between groceries and rent.
→ Tell that to the seniors splitting their pills in half because they can't afford refills.
→ Tell that to the single mom working two jobs and still can't afford daycare. This isn't a hoax. It's the daily reality for millions of American families. And while Trump dismisses their very real struggles from his gilded office, hardworking people across this country are making impossible choices just to survive. And Trump's extremist allies in the Senate aren't just denying the problem — they're actively making it worse. They're blocking every single piece of legislation that would help make life more affordable. **They look at struggling families and choose billionaires and big corporations every time. And then they have the audacity to call it a hoax when people cry out for help.** We can change this – but only if we win in November. **_[We need to unseat the extremists who are making things worse and driving costs up, but competing with the GOP and their billionaire donors won’t be easy. It will take all of us stepping up when we can. So please, if you can afford it, will you chip in $10 or $25 to help us flip the Senate and elect Democrats who will actually fight for the American people?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122526349/592762522/164382108?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.01.02_Combatting-Affordability-Crisis_B1_F1_S1_C1_90AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjYxNTZiYi1lYmU3LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HRQCz00cyTzPId585Y8XpmbblMc_mV07U99kTH_NBeE=)_** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[DONATE $10 NOW >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122526352/592762525/164382108?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.01.02_Combatting-Affordability-Crisis_B1_F1_S1_C1_90AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjYxNTZiYi1lYmU3LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HRQCz00cyTzPId585Y8XpmbblMc_mV07U99kTH_NBeE=) **

clean_body: I’m appalled... Donald Trump just called the affordability crisis a "hoax." = → Tell that to the families choosing between groceries and rent. → Tell that to the seniors splitting their pills in half because they can't afford refills. → Tell that to the single mom working two jobs and still can't afford daycare. This isn't a hoax. It's the daily reality for millions of American families. And while Trump dismisses their very real struggles from his gilded office, hardworking people across this country are making impossible choices just to survive. And Trump's extremist allies in the Senate aren't just denying the problem — they're actively making it worse. They're blocking every single piece of legislation that would help make life more affordable. They look at struggling families and choose billionaires and big corporations every time. And then they have the audacity to call it a hoax when people cry out for help. We can change this – but only if we win in November. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = In solidarity, = Kirsten Gillibrand * A message from DSCC Chair Kirsten Gillibrand: =

Peter - Our entire team here at the Democratic Party of Georgia wants to take a minute to thank you for your support in 2025. Our grassroots momentum is just getting started and now that it’s officially Election Year, we need your input more than ever to defend Senator Jon Ossoff’s seat and prevent more MAGA destruction. [Your voice matters, and we want to ensure the Democratic Party of Georgia tackles the issues most important to supporters like you in 2026. Will you take a moment to share your priorities with us to help set the tone for this Election Year?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122528210/592765757/-636375306?source=DPG_EM_EN_010226_B1_TY_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzE3ZjRiYS1lY2U3LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4rSLj1kB99zJtApLSAzLXqoLTya8fq_OdH2FAkFwC6U=&emci=c717f4ba-ece7-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=d717f4ba-ece7-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=43566853) | | **[MAKE YOUR VOICE HEARD](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122528212/592765763/-636375306?source=DPG_EM_EN_010226_B1_TY_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzE3ZjRiYS1lY2U3LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4rSLj1kB99zJtApLSAzLXqoLTya8fq_OdH2FAkFwC6U=&emci=c717f4ba-ece7-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=d717f4ba-ece7-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=43566853)**

We saw so many amazing wins last year, and it’s because of your energy, strength, and belief in defending a better future for Georgia and the entire country. Electing two Democrats in statewide Public Service Commission races was supposed to be impossible in Georgia, but **YOU** helped do that.
We also flipped a Trump +12 district blue in the HD 121 special election in November 2025 – **but Republicans are already arming themselves for November 2026 and we’re not done yet.**
What we do now will set the tone for the crucial Midterm elections in November and determine the strength of our democracy and our ability to fight for what matters.
[Please let us know, what issues matter most to you in 2026? Your input will help guide us as we prepare for November.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122528214/592765769/-636375306?source=DPG_EM_EN_010226_B1_TY_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzE3ZjRiYS1lY2U3LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4rSLj1kB99zJtApLSAzLXqoLTya8fq_OdH2FAkFwC6U=&emci=c717f4ba-ece7-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=d717f4ba-ece7-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=43566853)

name: Christina Bohannan
subject: HAPPY 2026!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRISTINA BOHANNAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
It's officially Election Year!

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122528845/592766721/-975735282?refcode=em_logoheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2U2ZGM2Ny1lZGU3LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T6HPMB3lTK_Mol4-HHkqm3EWdSCEaLXmt1h4SBQftts=)

Peter, good morning! Happy 2026!

I know it's a little early, but I really couldn't wait to give you the good news. Because — wow! What a start we have to this Election Year!

When we launched this campaign in June of last year, I knew we had a big challenge ahead. But month after month, you showed up and showed just what a grassroots campaign can do. We are proving to the nation and Mariannette Miller-Meeks that the days of a corporate party shill leading our district are over.

Iowans are ready to stand up and have a government that actually works for them. If this is what we can accomplish in as little as seven months, I can’t wait to see what the road to November will bring.

As excited as I am, I do know that the road ahead won’t be easy. But I’m not in this alone — and that makes all the difference. I’m so proud to be in this campaign with you.

Thank you,

Christina

Christina Bohannan is a mom, law professor, engineer and former state representative. She's running for Congress to defeat Mariannette Miller-Meeks and flip IA-01 blue.

Chip in to support her campaign today >> | **[DONATE NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122528846/592766723/-2011951990?refcode=em25_260102_eoqty_enask_gq_act___CB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_260102_eoqty_enask_gq_act___CB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=47e6dc67-ede7-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2U2ZGM2Ny1lZGU3LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T6HPMB3lTK_Mol4-HHkqm3EWdSCEaLXmt1h4SBQftts=)**

name: Jen Kiggans
subject: We weren’t sure what to do
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kiggans for Congress
body:
I don’t always listen to them

Peter,
You know, every now and then, my team tries to tell me how to play the game... how to be a "good politician".
But let me tell you, I'm not in this to play games or be a career politician. I'm in this to fight for what I believe in and to make a real difference.
I'm tired of the politicians who promise one thing and then do another. Who say whatever it takes to get elected, and then forget about the people who put them there.
This is Navy pilot Jen Kiggans, the Republican running in the #1 TOSS-UP race in the country.[](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.-gT7qHtw)Here's the reality: we can't continue to conduct our campaign as usual if we aren't able to raise what we need to keep the lights on. The Democrats have unlimited pocketbooks, and we're struggling to keep up!
During the last election, I had to empty my war chest to pull out the victory, and now we're coming up short.
Look, I know you get a lot of these messages, and believe me, I HATE asking, but I have no other choice. We won't win if you can't help us out. [SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN
](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._dBl2EX0N4TZm5h1nA)[CHIP IN TODAY
](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._HUoUk_IsNcsgcR8a4rO6g)You've read this far - and I'd be so grateful if you could chip in with even a dollar. [CHIP IN $1
](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)I couldn't do any of this without your generous support. Please know that I appreciate ALL your help..!
Jen Kiggans[](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)I would not be where I am today without the help of my incredible and faithful supporters like you. Because of your support, I can keep fighting to make our country stronger.

Together we will get our country back on the right track and secure America's success! [SUPPORT JEN KIGGANS
](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.-rk6mh-vzpPuCM_1UVTQ)| | Paid for by Kiggans for Congress

subject: I owe you a massive thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Janelle Bynum for Congress
body:
Having you on my team truly means a lot — and it’s powering our fight in Oregon.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122531798/592770046/-629675555?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2U4MDAxZjEtZWZlNy1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3RbNEbBFRYlil_fAXZIQZomUCUaEVS_aLWvJ8kFNfyU=) I owe you a massive thank you. [**Because of the support of this grassroots team, we didn’t just meet our end-of-quarter goal, we _exceeded_ it. Having you on my team truly means a lot — and it’s powering our fight in Oregon.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122531799/592770051/-629675555?amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C75%2C100%2C250%2C500&refcode=email_010226_thankyou&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2U4MDAxZjEtZWZlNy1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3RbNEbBFRYlil_fAXZIQZomUCUaEVS_aLWvJ8kFNfyU=) I first ran for Congress because, like you, I want to build a better future for my kids and the next generation. That’s why I’m fighting every day in Congress to lower costs, strengthen our public education system, and deliver real change that benefits hardworking people. But here’s the thing: with Republicans in total control in Washington, they’re standing in the way of positive change for Oregonians. Instead of putting hardworking people first, they’re pushing through policies that strip millions of Americans of their healthcare and food assistance while giving tax handouts to billionaires. This year is our best chance to put an end to their failed leadership in Washington and work to restore Medicaid funding, protect the critical programs that millions of people rely on, and put up roadblocks to Trump’s reckless agenda. [_**With so much on the line, I’m counting on this grassroots team to stand with me and fight for the future we believe in. If you can, please make your first donation of the year now and join this people-powered team working to build a brighter future for Oregonians.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122531801/592770053/1565084121?amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C75%2C100%2C250%2C500&refcode=email_010226_thankyou&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2U4MDAxZjEtZWZlNy1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3RbNEbBFRYlil_fAXZIQZomUCUaEVS_aLWvJ8kFNfyU=) Thanks so much. name: Team DNC
subject: Thank you for sticking with us
body:
---
Derek, Happy New Year! We just wanted to drop in and say _thank you_. If you’ve been on our list for a while, you know our end-of-quarter fundraising push can get busy, and we send a few more messages than normal. Thank you for sticking with us. Here’s the truth: these emails are one of our biggest sources of grassroots donations because of committed supporters just like you across the country. As we kick off the New Year, we’re laser-focused on the midterms. This year, we have a chance to flip the House and Senate, and elect Democratic leaders who will work tirelessly to protect their states, districts, and communities from Trump’s dangerous agenda. With such an important year ahead of us, we know that our work starts now. And today, we’re asking if you’ll officially join us. [**If you’re ready to fight with us towards flipping Congress and putting a critical check on Trump’s power, we hope you’ll join thousands of other Democrats in getting your own 2026 DNC Member Card today →**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2025-member-card?refcode=em_20260102_5599_fr&amount=7&refcode2=5599_22930333_PazUxV&akid=5599%2E22930333%2EPazUxV) [](https://ak.democrats.org/go/28741?refcode=em_20260102_5599_fr&amount=7&t=1&akid=5599%2E22930333%2EPazUxV) Thank you again for everything and more soon, The Democrats

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

These aren't arbitrary numbers. They're carefully calculated goals based on what we need to build a winning campaign. And every dollar we fall short _now_ is a dollar we have to make up later when the pressure is even higher.

The foundation we build in these first few months will determine how we fight back when the Republican attack ads start.

**And we're not going to sugarcoat it, Derek: we need to be prepared.**

The same billionaire-funded super PACs that flooded the airwaves in 2024 are gearing up for one of the most consequential election years we’ve ever seen, and they know that if they flip Virginia, Democrats have no path to a Senate majority.

The only way we can compete is by building a massive grassroots operation funded by thousands of supporters each giving what they can.

Team Warner **Before you go:**

**And they know that there’s no Senate majority for Democrats without Virginia.**

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/83abc06c-3eba-440a-8d76-e1887ed2cf0f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/83abc06c-3eba-440a-8d76-e1887ed2cf0f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_**by Ellie Leonard, Contributing Editor**_
Long before political rallies and plastering gold leaf all over the Oval Office, Donald Trump was married to Ivana Zelničkova, a Czechoslovakian immigrant born to a working-class family. Her mother worked as a telephone operator, and her father as an electrical engineer who encouraged his daughter to learn to ski, giving her the opportunity to travel beyond the Soviet-era borders of the Czechoslovak Socialist Republic.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/83abc06c-3eba-440a-8d76-e1887ed2cf0f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Records say that Ivana attended Charles University in Prague, earning her master's degree in physical education in 1972. However, a declassified report from the FBI in 1989 that was originally listed as "secret" (and is highly redacted), states that she lived in Vienna in 1972.
> #### "A review of Ivana's INS file revealed that it is fraught with inconsistencies regarding dates of residence, schooling and employment. It appears that she emigrated to Vienna, Austria...where she was employed as a model. Nowhere else in her INS file is there any indication of ever having attended Charles University." \- The Federal Bureau of Investigation, 1989
In 1971 she married Alfred Winklmayr, an Austrian ski instructor, in order to leave Czechoslovakia and become an Austrian citizen. It is what was referred to at the time as a "Cold War marriage," and was dissolved in 1973, around the same time her boyfriend Jiři Staidl died in a car crash. By this time Winklmayr had moved to Los Angeles to continue working as a ski instructor. Ivana moved to Canada and began dating Jiři Syrovatka and working as a model for the Audrey Morris Agency.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/83abc06c-3eba-440a-8d76-e1887ed2cf0f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Donald Trump and Ivana Zelničkova's first meeting
While working at a reception in 1976 at the now-closed Maxwell's Plum in New York City, Ivana met Donald Trump. They would marry a year later on April 9th, 1977, signing a $25 million prenup that she would later claim she hadn't understood. They had their first child, Donald Jr., exactly nine months later, and would go on to have two more kids, Ivanka and Eric, over the next seven years, all while Donald built up his casinos and real estate and earned a reputation as a New York City playboy.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/83abc06c-3eba-440a-8d76-e1887ed2cf0f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Donald Trump's 1977 wedding to Ivana Zelničkova, which included his parents, Fred and Mary Anne (left)
> #### "He even tried to get _Playboy_ to do a spread called 'The Girls of Trump,' wooing his most shapely staffers, including a former beauty queen secretary, into posing for the magazine with a sliding scale of offers on everything from full nude to breast to 'wet-lip' shots." \- Wayne Barrett, author of _Trump, The Greatest Show on Earth: The Deals, The Downfall, the Reinvention_
During his marriage to Ivana, Donald was known for getting handsy with other women. One woman, Jessica Leeds, told the New York Times that Trump "grabbed her breasts and tried to put his hand up her skirt," on a flight in the 1980s.
> #### "He was like an octopus, his hands were everywhere." \- Jessica Leeds
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/83abc06c-3eba-440a-8d76-e1887ed2cf0f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Donald Trump and Marla Maples, 1991
In 1985, Donald met Marla Maples, runner-up Miss Georgia USA, and the 1983 Miss Resaca Beach Poster Girl, at a celebrity tennis match. She was 20 years old; he was 39. At first, they hid their relationship, but soon became more brazen, and Maples even moved onto Trump's yacht, the _Trump Princess._ In 1989, he even brought Maples secretly along on a family vacation to Aspen, hoping he could have his cake and eat it too. Maples had other plans. She approached Ivana and put out her hand: "I'm Marla, and I love your husband. Do you?" When Trump was interviewed about it later, he said casually, "There wasn't shouting, but you could obviously see there was some friction."
> #### "I'm Marla and I love your husband. Do you?"
By 1990, Donald and Ivana were divorced (the documents sealed by a confidentiality agreement), and though Maples hoped this meant they could be married right away, it wasn't until she got pregnant in 1993 that Trump even considered the idea. In fact, he proposed something else, according to his good pal Jeffrey Epstein.
As recorded by journalist Michael Wolff, who interviewed Jeffrey Epstein over several years, when Marla Maples told Trump she was pregnant, he panicked. "What am I going to do? She's pregnant. I'm going to have to marry her." Epstein thought Maples was lying, but after a visit to the doctor, it was confirmed that she was indeed pregnant. "What if I pushed her down the stairs?" Trump mused. "You could murder her and go to jail," said Epstein. "Or perhaps nothing would happen, but you would have pushed her down the stairs. And when the divorce happens, that would be something she could testify to in court."
> #### "What if I pushed her down the stairs?"
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/83abc06c-3eba-440a-8d76-e1887ed2cf0f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Donald Trump marries Marla Maples - December 20, 1993
Donald ended up marrying Maples--two months after giving birth to their daughter Tiffany--at a wedding attended by Jeffrey Epstein at the Plaza Hotel in New York City. Three years later, Maples would be caught having an affair with Trump's bodyguard, Spencer Wagner, under a lifeguard stand at 4:00 am, and they separated a year later. Their divorce, too, would be sealed, but not before he moved on to his current wife, Melania (Knauss) Trump.
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=182900946&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgyOTAwOTQ2LCJpYXQiOjE3NjczNjk2MjEsImV4cCI6MTc2OTk2MTYyMSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.eGqZHt82YHXSXni9sMOJxZ2n-cidoK6QEPFsnl9Duho)
Meanwhile, Ivana had begun writing books and giving interviews about what life with Donald Trump really looked like, especially when it came to family.
> #### "He was a loving father, don't get me wrong, and he was a good provider, but he was not the father which would take a stroll and go to the Central Park or go play to baseball with them or something. It was only until they were about 18-years-old [that] he could communicate with them, because he could start to talk business with them." \- Ivana Trump
She said she feared Fred Trump, who was a "really brutal father," and that Donald didn't want his first child named after himself: "[What] if he's a loser?"
In a 1990 divorce deposition, Ivana allegedly stated that Donald had raped her after going "16 months without making love to his wife." The deposition, although not public, was obtained by Harry Hurt III, author of the 1993 book _"The Lost Tycoon: The Many Lives of Donald J. Trump_." Ivana would later refute her statement, saying that she didn't mean it to be taken literally, but that she had felt "violated." Harry Hurt III described the alleged attack as a "violent assault," and that Ivana had confided it to close friends. On another occasion, he had ripped hair out of Ivana's scalp after an altercation in a plastic surgeon's office. She would file for divorce a year later on the grounds of "cruel and inhuman" treatment.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/83abc06c-3eba-440a-8d76-e1887ed2cf0f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In 1992, Trump sued Ivana for $25 million for violating the gag clause in their divorce agreement by "disclosing facts about him in her best-selling book", _For Love Alone_ , a fictional romance. This was the same amount as their prenuptial agreement, which he could no longer afford due to being reportedly "over half a billion dollars in the hole." He won, bolstering the gag order, though to what end I don't know. Her book would continue to print over the next two years.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/83abc06c-3eba-440a-8d76-e1887ed2cf0f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Ivana with Ivanka, Eric, and Donald Jr.
In hindsight, Ivana had more perspective on her marriage, which she had once held in such high esteem, at least on the surface. In 1987, a decade into their marriage, and two years after being introduced to Marla Maples, Donald handed Ivana a stack of papers the "size of a telephone book." "It's our new nuptial agreement," he said. "You get $10 million. Sign it." It was Christmas Eve.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/83abc06c-3eba-440a-8d76-e1887ed2cf0f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Ivana Trump was President of the Plaza Hotel in 1988 - The New York Times
And when Ivana went back to work for Donald, he would call her, screaming into the phone, "You don't know what you're doing!" When her coworkers asked her why she put up with him, she said, "Because Donald is right." He hated how she dressed, thought she showed too much cleavage, and he wanted her to work less and be home with the kids more. Eventually, he stopped having sex with her, and she blamed herself.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/83abc06c-3eba-440a-8d76-e1887ed2cf0f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Donald and Ivana Trump in Aspen
When the story of Ivana confronting Marla Maples in Aspen hit the newspapers, Donald called the reporter, gossip columnist Liz Smith from the New York Daily News, to thank her.
"Congratulations on your story," he said. "I've had it with Ivana. She's gotten to be like Leona Helmsley."
"Shame on you, Donald," Smith replied. "How dare you say that about the mother of your children?"
"Just write that someone from Howard Rubenstein's said it. I never said that (about Ivana)."
[Leave a comment](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=182900946&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgyOTAwOTQ2LCJpYXQiOjE3NjczNjk2MjEsImV4cCI6MTc2OTk2MTYyMSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.eGqZHt82YHXSXni9sMOJxZ2n-cidoK6QEPFsnl9Duho&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment)
Ivana remembered a man named John Walter who would visit Donald in his office, always clicking his heels and saying "Heil Hitler," which she assumed was a family joke. Donald kept a copy of Hitler's _My New Order_ next to the bed, she said, a compilation of speeches leading up to 1939. She asked Donald who had given it to him.
"Actually, it was my friend Marty Davis from Paramount who gave me a copy of _Mein Kampf (not My New Order)_ , and he's a Jew."
Davis would refute the latter, stating that it had, indeed, been _My New Order_ , and that he wasn't, in fact, Jewish. Trump has always been cryptic about the whole thing.
"_If_ I had these speeches, and I'm not saying that I do, I would never read them."
And while Donald Trump continued to discredit Ivana whenever and wherever he could, she spent time making amends with the people he'd screwed over. But as word spread, their kids began to crumble under the pressure.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/83abc06c-3eba-440a-8d76-e1887ed2cf0f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Ivanka, Donald Jr., and Eric Trump
> #### "The children are all wrecks. I don't know how Donald can say they are great and fine. Ivanka now comes home from school crying, 'Mommy, does it mean I'm not going to be Ivanka Trump anymore?' Little Eric asks me, 'Is it true you are going away and not coming back?'" \- Ivana to Liz Smith, New York Daily News
Years passed, and while Ivana found success writing three more books and appearing on the Home Shopping Network and QVC, where her purple velour jogging suits and Australian crystal pave lockets sold $3 to $4 million a month, by the time the COVID lockdowns hit New York City she had become a complete recluse in her $20 million town house just off Central Park on the Upper East Side. She'd remarried and remarried again, and although she'd divorced her last husband, Italian actor Rossano Rubicondi, 11 years prior, his death of a pulmonary embolism in 2021 was further reason for her not to leave her house. Coupled with her fear of catching COVID, she'd completely pulled away from friends and family.
> #### "She hasn't gone anywhere or done anything. She was so afraid of getting sick, so she really became very reclusive." \- Nikki Haskell, friend
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/83abc06c-3eba-440a-8d76-e1887ed2cf0f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Ivana Trump in front of her staircase
On July 14th, 2022, Ivana Trump was discovered at the bottom of her circular staircase, dead of an apparent fall. Some reports say that an unknown male called in a wellness check on Trump's residence when "he hadn't seen her in a while." Others say police responded to a cardiac arrest at her 10 East 64th Street home, and that she was "dead on arrival." The New York City Medical Examiner said she died of "blunt impact injuries" to the torso, and the NYPD said there did not "appear to be any criminality" related to her death. The death was ruled accidental.
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=182900946&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgyOTAwOTQ2LCJpYXQiOjE3NjczNjk2MjEsImV4cCI6MTc2OTk2MTYyMSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.eGqZHt82YHXSXni9sMOJxZ2n-cidoK6QEPFsnl9Duho)
Now, we can look at Ivana's death at 73 years old in two ways. One, she had a "steep and deep" marble staircase with ratty carpets that worried her friends.
> #### "I was always so upset about that staircase. I hated those stairs. They were so treacherous. We worried about her falling. Her townhouse was four stories high and while there was an elevator, she never used it. It's a beautiful staircase but I wouldn't want it. It's so steep and deep. Friends used to say to me, 'Why don't you stay with Ivana when you're in New York?' But you couldn't pay me to hang out there and go up and down those stairs." \- Nikki Haskell, friend
And I'm not saying that didn't happen; it easily could have. But there's always door number two.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/83abc06c-3eba-440a-8d76-e1887ed2cf0f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The Associated Press
Around the time Ivana Trump was killed "falling down the stairs" her ex-husband, Donald Trump, and two children, Ivanka and Donald Jr., were being deposed by the New York City Attorney General's Office as part of a civil investigation into the family real estate business over "fraudulent conduct in the way the Trump Organization valued its real estate holdings, allegedly overvaluing properties like 40 Wall Street and even the former president's Trump Tower apartment." While there is no evidence that Ivana would have been deposed, she held key managerial positions in the Trump Organization. The Attorney General delayed the depositions after Ivana's passing.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/83abc06c-3eba-440a-8d76-e1887ed2cf0f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Trump sits in a Manhattan courthouse during the trial for his civil fraud case in New York, U.S., October 17, 2023 - Reuters
In February 2024, Judge Arthur Engoron ordered the defendants, Donald Trump and two sons, Donald Jr. and Eric (Ivanka was removed due to the statute of limitations), to pay a total of $364 million of "ill-gotten gains." As of today, they have not paid a dime, Donald Trump calling Engoron a "rogue" and "fake judge," and stating that he (Trump) had "won the case because it's called 'statute of limitations.'"
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/83abc06c-3eba-440a-8d76-e1887ed2cf0f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Ivana Trump is buried under a modest headstone at Donald Trump's golf course in Bedminster, New Jersey, near the first hole, 1300 yards from the graves of 97 Black Civil War soldiers, a juxtaposition that has not gone unnoticed. New Jersey is the only state north of the Mason-Dixon line to have enslaved Black Americans prior to the Civil War. However, Ivana's presence along the par 5 likely has more to do with tax avoidance than any kind of honor or "in memoriam." Because, according to the New Jersey state tax code, any land used as a cemetery is exempt from most taxes, including real estate. Bedminster also receives a "farmland" tax break, saving Trump's golf course a quarter-million dollars a year.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/83abc06c-3eba-440a-8d76-e1887ed2cf0f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Donald Trump, Donald Jr., and Ivana, 1978
So, depending on how much Ivana's last resting place along the first hole accounts for, she'll have the $25 million prenup paid off in no time.
* * *
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/83abc06c-3eba-440a-8d76-e1887ed2cf0f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

Marriage, money, silence--and what followed her to the grave | | and | Jan 2 | | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- by Ellie Leonard, Contributing Editor Long before political rallies and plastering gold leaf all over the Oval Office, Donald Trump was married to Ivana Zelničkova, a Czechoslovakian immigrant born to a working-class family. Her mother worked as a telephone operator, and her father as an electrical engineer who encouraged his daughter to learn to ski, giving her the opportunity to travel beyond the Soviet-era borders of the Czechoslovak Socialist Republic. | | ---|---|--- Records say that Ivana attended Charles University in Prague, earning her master's degree in physical education in 1972. However, a declassified report from the FBI in 1989 that was originally listed as "secret" (and is highly redacted), states that she lived in Vienna in 1972. #### "A review of Ivana's INS file revealed that it is fraught with inconsistencies regarding dates of residence, schooling and employment. It appears that she emigrated to Vienna, Austria...where she was employed as a model. Nowhere else in her INS file is there any indication of ever having attended Charles University." \- The Federal Bureau of Investigation, 1989 In 1971 she married Alfred Winklmayr, an Austrian ski instructor, in order to leave Czechoslovakia and become an Austrian citizen. It is what was referred to at the time as a "Cold War marriage," and was dissolved in 1973, around the same time her boyfriend Jiři Staidl died in a car crash. By this time Winklmayr had moved to Los Angeles to continue working as a ski instructor. Ivana moved to Canada and began dating Jiři Syrovatka and working as a model for the Audrey Morris Agency. | | ---|---|--- Donald Trump and Ivana Zelničkova's first meeting While working at a reception in 1976 at the now-closed Maxwell's Plum in New York City, Ivana met Donald Trump. They would marry a year later on April 9th, 1977, signing a $25 million prenup that she would later claim she hadn't understood. They had their first child, Donald Jr., exactly nine months later, and would go on to have two more kids, Ivanka and Eric, over the next seven years, all while Donald built up his casinos and real estate and earned a reputation as a New York City playboy. | | ---|---|--- Donald Trump's 1977 wedding to Ivana Zelničkova, which included his parents, Fred and Mary Anne (left) #### "He even tried to get Playboy to do a spread called 'The Girls of Trump,' wooing his most shapely staffers, including a former beauty queen secretary, into posing for the magazine with a sliding scale of offers on everything from full nude to breast to 'wet-lip' shots." \- Wayne Barrett, author of Trump, The Greatest Show on Earth: The Deals, The Downfall, the Reinvention During his marriage to Ivana, Donald was known for getting handsy with other women. She was 20 years old; he was 39. At first, they hid their relationship, but soon became more brazen, and Maples even moved onto Trump's yacht, the Trump Princess. As recorded by journalist Michael Wolff, who interviewed Jeffrey Epstein over several years, when Marla Maples told Trump she was pregnant, he panicked. "What am I going to do? She's pregnant. The death was ruled accidental. Now, we can look at Ivana's death at 73 years old in two ways. One, she had a "steep and deep" marble staircase with ratty carpets that worried her friends. #### "I was always so upset about that staircase. I hated those stairs. They were so treacherous. We worried about her falling. Her townhouse was four stories high and while there was an elevator, she never used it. It's a beautiful staircase but I wouldn't want it. It's so steep and deep. Friends used to say to me, 'Why don't you stay with Ivana when you're in New York?' But you couldn't pay me to hang out there and go up and down those stairs." \- Nikki Haskell, friend And I'm not saying that didn't happen; it easily could have. But there's always door number two. | | ---|---|--- The Associated Press Around the time Ivana Trump was killed "falling down the stairs" her ex-husband, Donald Trump, and two children, Ivanka and Donald Jr., were being deposed by the New York City Attorney General's Office as part of a civil investigation into the family real estate business over "fraudulent conduct in the way the Trump Organization valued its real estate holdings, allegedly overvaluing properties like 40 Wall Street and even the former president's Trump Tower apartment." While there is no evidence that Ivana would have been deposed, she held key managerial positions in the Trump Organization. The Attorney General delayed the depositions after Ivana's passing. | | ---|---|--- Trump sits in a Manhattan courthouse during the trial for his civil fraud case in New York, U.S., October 17, 2023 - Reuters In February 2024, Judge Arthur Engoron ordered the defendants, Donald Trump and two sons, Donald Jr. and Eric (Ivanka was removed due to the statute of limitations), to pay a total of $364 million of "ill-gotten gains." As of today, they have not paid a dime, Donald Trump calling Engoron a "rogue" and "fake judge," and stating that he (Trump) had "won the case because it's called 'statute of limitations.'" | | ---|---|--- Ivana Trump is buried under a modest headstone at Donald Trump's golf course in Bedminster, New Jersey, near the first hole, 1300 yards from the graves of 97 Black Civil War soldiers, a juxtaposition that has not gone unnoticed. New Jersey is the only state north of the Mason-Dixon line to have enslaved Black Americans prior to the Civil War. However, Ivana's presence along the par 5 likely has more to do with tax avoidance than any kind of honor or "in memoriam." Because, according to the New Jersey state tax code, any land used as a cemetery is exempt from most taxes, including real estate. Bedminster also receives a "farmland" tax break, saving Trump's golf course a quarter-million dollars a year. | | ---|---|--- Donald Trump, Donald Jr., and Ivana, 1978 So, depending on how much Ivana's last resting place along the first hole accounts for, she'll have the $25 million prenup paid off in no time. * | | ---|---|--- You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2026 Cliff Schecter PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 ? ?

The JUDICIAL COUP against President Trump starts at our highest court, and KBJ is as TRUMP-DERANGED and RADICAL as it gets. The Democrats are FIGHTING LIKE HELL to barricade Ketanji Brown Jackson in the Supreme Court for DECADES to come. It’s going to take a HERCULEAN EFFORT from Republicans like YOU to remove her from the bench. Will you rush back your IMPEACH KBJ PETITION in the next 5 minutes? I still need THOUSANDS more. Vin Kruttiventi for Congress P.O. Box 850, Wilton, CA, 95693 |

It feels like an understatement to say so much has changed since January 2025. Since Donald Trump's second inauguration, I've watched him attack immigrants, cut SNAP and Medicaid, threaten Social Security, and enrich himself at the expense of everyday Americans. With Senator Durbin retiring, and Trump’s chaos impacting families across our state, I felt called to step up, launch my campaign for the U.S. Senate, and fight for Illinoisans. But I haven't fought back alone. You've been with me every step of the way. When I questioned Trump officials in hearings. When I drove cross-country through the night to cast my vote against his radical agenda. When I got the police called on me for trying to conduct oversight at ICE facilities. When I introduced legislation to repeal his devastating cuts. Your support has made all of that possible. And I'm grateful. But here's the truth: 2025 was just the warm-up — 2026 is when everything is on the line. This year, we have a chance to flip the Senate and finally rein in Trump's unchecked power. We can end the chaos. Restore accountability. Protect the programs that millions of families depend on. But if we fall short, Trump will be emboldened to continue his assault on everything we hold dear. There will be nothing to stop him from packing the courts, rigging redistricting, gutting Medicare, and enriching his billionaire cronies. Trump's super PACs have already stockpiled over $200 million to defeat Democrats. They're going to throw everything they have at flipping seats and protecting their MAGA majorities. They know that if we win, their grip on power is over. = | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for everything you've done this year. subject: We don’t coast. We build.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman
clean_body: | | | Friend — There’s a temptation, after a big year, to take a breath and assume the hard part is over. But that’s not how winning works. 2025 proved something important: this campaign has real power.** We organized. We held the line. We showed that a frontline Virginia district doesn’t fold under pressure. Now comes the part that actually decides 2026 — what we do next. MAGA isn’t resting. They’re already recruiting challengers, stockpiling cash, and preparing to target seats like mine because they know Virginia is the key to everything that comes next. That’s why we are asking you to act now, before Elizabeth goes into session and the VA fundraising ban goes into effect: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. This campaign has never been about last-minute miracles. It’s been about doing the work — early and relentlessly — so we’re not scrambling when it matters most. ** Thanks so much for your support. — Team Guzman | Democrat is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. To donate by check, send to: Friends of Elizabeth Guzman PO Box 74, Nokesville VA, 20182 \- \- Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman. name: Marina Jenkins, NDRC
subject: Happy New Year, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
This is our moment.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122536779/592785709/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg0ZDE1ODM4LWY2ZTctZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=es760xV1i9ReQZ1T6U5sv-XZh7oURsm2HauiLbgVrho=&emci=ff85ea30-8be5-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=84d15838-f6e7-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=8431045)
---

Happy New Year, Peter. I hope your holiday season has been filled with the joy of spending time with loved ones and resting up for the critical year ahead. I’ve been reflecting on how the fair maps movement wouldn’t exist without people like you — the folks who answer the call time and time again to defend our democracy. We’ve asked a lot of you lately, because last year demanded much of us. Donald Trump launched a redistricting crisis the likes of which American democracy has never seen. But we launched something, too: A wave of resistance that took on extreme politicians who are attempting to hoard their power and insulate themselves from voters. This is the history-making, generation-defining fight that the NDRC was built to take on. This is our moment. Time and time again, we demonstrated that if we stand together and fight back, we can win. But this fight is far from over. In the days ahead, we expect as many as eight states to initiate mid-decade redistricting — and we must be prepared for all of it. **We need to take on these state-level battles to preserve a level playing field in the 2026 midterms. We need to elect pro-democracy champions to serve as a check on Donald Trump’s extremism and end this redistricting crisis once and for all. And we need the resources to ensure we don’t have to make impossible choices about where to put our efforts next year, when this work matters most.** [**If you can, start 2026 with a donation**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122536780/592785710/1128139581?refcode=cul_ndrc_tier1_email_ThankYouHNY_email_20260102-NDRC-Tier1-ThankYouHNY_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=cul&utm_content=20260102-NDRC-Tier1-ThankYouHNY_&utm_campaign=ThankYouHNY&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg0ZDE1ODM4LWY2ZTctZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=es760xV1i9ReQZ1T6U5sv-XZh7oURsm2HauiLbgVrho=) powering our pro-democracy work. Help us prepare for the fights ahead and ensure we can defend our representative democracy wherever it’s under attack. Thank you for your steadfast commitment to our work. And once again, happy New Year to you and yours. Marina Jenkins
Executive Director, National Democratic Redistricting Committee | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122536781/592785711/1128139581?refcode=cul_ndrc_tier1_email_ThankYouHNY_email_20260102-NDRC-Tier1-ThankYouHNY_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=cul&utm_content=20260102-NDRC-Tier1-ThankYouHNY_&utm_campaign=ThankYouHNY&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg0ZDE1ODM4LWY2ZTctZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=es760xV1i9ReQZ1T6U5sv-XZh7oURsm2HauiLbgVrho=)

name: Mark Kelly
subject: I will not give up on our country.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
It has given me too much, and I’ll never be able to repay that debt. I still believe in our democracy, our values, and our Constitution.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99051?refcode=em20260102-9898&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9898%2E614464%2Ei3YDid)
Peter,
If you can believe it, things didn’t stop when Trump called for my hanging. It didn’t stop with the threat of a court-martial from Pete Hegseth, either. It didn’t stop when the FBI wanted to talk to me and other members of Congress. Because now the Department of Defense has announced that it is escalating its investigation into me.
All for saying things the president didn’t like to hear.
If you’re feeling like this isn’t the country you grew up in, I don’t blame you. But I hope you aren’t giving up on it, Peter.
I certainly haven’t. This country has given me too much, and I’ll never be able to repay that debt. I still believe in our democracy, our values, and our Constitution.
There’s no chance in hell that somebody like Donald Trump is going to stop me from serving the people of this nation. None.
If he thought all of this was going to shut me up, he’s got another thing coming.
And if you’d be willing to help support me, please:
**[Split a donation between Heartland Patriots and me.
