name: Mark Kelly
subject: Fight like hell
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Don’t make the mistake of thinking this is just about me. It’s about every person who has the courage to speak out against Trump. Trump wants all of us living in fear, and I don’t intend to let him win.
#

Team: I’m writing to ask you for $5.
That’s right: just $5.
$5 because we’re under enormous pressure right now.
$5 because Donald Trump wants to stamp out any and all opposition, and he’s willing to undermine your First Amendment rights to do it.
$5 because he’s sent his lapdog, Pete Hegseth, after me, and he’s moving ahead with a sham investigation to drag my name through the mud and destroy everything I fought for during my 25 years in uniform.
Don’t make the mistake of thinking this is just about me. It’s about every person who has the courage to speak out against Trump. Trump wants all of us living in fear, and I don’t intend to let him win.
It’s time to fight like hell. I need your help to do it.
[**Can you make a contribution of $5, or whatever you can afford, to help power our work against Trump, Hegseth, and anyone else who would take away our liberties?**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-jan26-dod/.5aNDqx&refcode=em260102-1-9D&t=1&akid=6320%2E6688874%2EY_CqQ_)

Mark

name: Demand Justice PAC
subject: Because of you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Demand Justice PAC
body:
[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/54940?refcode=em20260102-61044&t=1001&akid=61044%2E1407376%2EJta0sj ]Demand Justice PAC[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/54940?refcode=em20260102-61044&t=1002&akid=61044%2E1407376%2EJta0sj ]Demand Justice PAC

Thank you
for standing with us last year.

Supporters like you helped Demand Justice take on corruption, defend the
rule of law, and hold the powerful accountable at every turn. You helped
us shine a light on abuses of power, fight back against court-packing, and
push to make our justice system work for the people — not the wealthy and
well-connected.

But the fight isn’t over. The powerful still think they can rig our
courts, shred the rule of law, and stack the system against Americans.
They think they can get away with corruption.

We don’t tiptoe around corruption. We call it out. We challenge it. We
take it head-on. And with your help, we will keep doing exactly that —
every single day.

Your support makes this work possible. Every contribution fuels our
ability to investigate abuses, expose corruption, and hold bad actors
accountable.

[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/55459?c0=dj-em-20260102._2RQ1H&refcode=em20260102-61044&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1003&akid=61044%2E1407376%2EJta0sj ]As we kick off the new year, we’re asking you to chip in today to keep
the fight going. No matter the size, your donation powers our work to
defend democracy, protect our courts, and ensure that justice works for
everyone, not just the powerful.

[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/55459?c0=dj-em-20260102._2RQ1H&amount=5&refcode=em20260102-61044&t=1022&akid=61044%2E1407376%2EJta0sj ]Donate $5 ››

In solidarity,

Demand Justice PAC

name: Kim Schrier
subject: A heartfelt New Year's thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122545981/592811350/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTM1OTA1Ni0wYWU4LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZIdsCCuDiNa8MEXJYVpF7555C0eitz8nzCPn-pYDAnc=&emci=f4b3a91b-9eda-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=81359056-0ae8-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=15820338)
---

_Happy New Year, Peter!_

As we step into 2026 together, I want to share some wonderful news:

Thanks to you, we hit our end-of-year fundraising goal! That momentum means we're starting this year in a strong position to hold WA-08 and to help flip the House blue.

But more than the numbers, what fills me with hope is the spirit behind them. This year brings big challenges and big opportunities for our country, and I know we're ready to meet them head-on. Election Day will be here before we know it, but today, I just want to take a moment to say something simple: Thank you.

**Thank you for standing with my campaign.

Thank you for believing in our work.

And thank you for everything you do—not just for me, but for our democracy.**

I'm looking forward to everything we'll accomplish together in the year ahead.

With gratitude,

Kim Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat. | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122545982/592811351/1210615431?refcode=em25_260102_eoqty_enask_gq_act___ks_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_260102_eoqty_enask_gq_act___ks_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=81359056-0ae8-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTM1OTA1Ni0wYWU4LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZIdsCCuDiNa8MEXJYVpF7555C0eitz8nzCPn-pYDAnc=)

clean_body: Happy New Year, Peter! As we step into 2026 together, I want to share some wonderful news: Thanks to you, we hit our end-of-year fundraising goal! That momentum means we're starting this year in a strong position to hold WA-08 and to help flip the House blue. But more than the numbers, what fills me with hope is the spirit behind them. This year brings big challenges and big opportunities for our country, and I know we're ready to meet them head-on. Election Day will be here before we know it, but today, I just want to take a moment to say something simple: Thank you. Thank you for standing with my campaign. Thank you for believing in our work. And thank you for everything you do—not just for me, but for our democracy. I'm looking forward to everything we'll accomplish together in the year ahead. With gratitude, Kim Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat. | = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

name: AOC
subject: We cannot give up on winning the hearts and minds of our fellow Americans.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
We cannot give up on winning the hearts and minds of our fellow Americans.
If you have ever canvassed before and knocked on doors, you know that most people do not have neat worldviews that fit in one category or another.
The most important thing that you can do is find those people, and start to build relationships with them _now_.
Because a lot of people don't change how they vote based on a debate. **A lot of people will change how they vote based on someone they care about**.
When people start seeing actions happen around them... you know, first it's like, “Oh, there's a town hall down the street.” They're not going to _go_ , but they're going to _notice_ that it's happening.
People start getting the message eventually. And that heartbeat starts now.
This, to me, is one area where the Democratic Party has historically been quite weak. **We can't show up _just_ for election season**.
How many of us have had a family member, or someone that you care about, lost to this Trump dark web? How many young boys get sucked up into Andrew Tate stuff?
I don't even feel defensive or angry about it — I feel really bummed that the right wing is dooming a lot of little boys and men to loneliness because of these ideas that they have around other people.
That work is really complicated. **That's the work that we need to do**.
It is about applying pressure to elected officials, and it is _also_ about transforming each other.
In solidarity,
Alexandria
Alexandria is going to continue to build a mass movement for a better world, one person at a time.
But she can't do that work alone, she needs a movement alongside here.
[Help us continue the fight by splitting a grassroots contribution between Courage to Change (AOC's Leadership PAC to support progressives) and our campaign today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20260102-ctc.wogeyN&refcode=em20260102-10510-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=10510%2E2526796%2E5Dpa8T)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20260102-ctc.wogeyN&refcode=em20260102-10510-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=10510%2E2526796%2E5Dpa8T)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20260102-ctc?refcode=em20260102-10510-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=21&refcode2=10510_2526796_5Dpa8T&akid=10510%2E2526796%2E5Dpa8T)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20260102-10510-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=22&akid=10510%2E2526796%2E5Dpa8T)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=23&akid=10510%2E2526796%2E5Dpa8T) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=24&akid=10510%2E2526796%2E5Dpa8T) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=25&akid=10510%2E2526796%2E5Dpa8T) | [](https://bsky.app/profile/aoc.bsky.social?t=26&akid=10510%2E2526796%2E5Dpa8T)
---|---|---|---

To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: Team Haley
subject: We’re counting on you, null
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
This is important.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1808%2E49239%2EFva0I-)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11260?t=2&akid=1808%2E49239%2EFva0I-)
---
Null, the election year has begun – and what happens in Michigan will decide Senate control. We need the strongest grassroots team possible to win this Toss Up race and send Haley Stevens, a proven fighter for Michiganders, to the U.S. Senate.
[**Will you chip in any amount now to become a 2026 Founding Donor of our campaign? We set a goal to reach 25,000 new Founding Donors by Monday at midnight to help us kick off the year in a powerful position, and we’re counting on you to be one of them.**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11261?t=3&akid=1808%2E49239%2EFva0I-)
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11261?t=4&akid=1808%2E49239%2EFva0I-)
Poll after poll shows Haley as the _only_ Democrat in this race consistently leading MAGA Republican Mike Rogers in head-to-head matchups. _The momentum is behind us._
But here’s the bad news: Experts at _The Hill_ say that Michigan is one of the **most likely Senate seats to flip this November.**
Republicans spent nearly $80 million last election cycle to try to turn Michigan’s Senate seat red – they failed, but just barely. Now, they’re back for revenge, and Rogers has the personal endorsement of Donald Trump.
**Mike Rogers might have Trump and his MAGA megadonors, but we have something much better:_people like you_. And right now, we need you more than ever to help us show the strength of this grassroots movement and stay on track to win.**
[**So, null, will you chip in now to become one of the 25,000 Founding Donors we need in 2026 to keep Michigan blue and take back the Senate?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11261?t=5&akid=1808%2E49239%2EFva0I-)
| | [Donate Now](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11261?t=6&akid=1808%2E49239%2EFva0I-)
---
We’re grateful to have you by our side in this fight.

Thank you,

Team Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11157?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=7&akid=1808%2E49239%2EFva0I-) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11260?t=8&akid=1808%2E49239%2EFva0I-)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=9&akid=1808%2E49239%2EFva0I-)
Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate.
33717 Woodward Ave #539
Birmingham, MI 48009

name: Adem T. Bunkeddeko
subject: I almost jumped in (but here’s the real plunge)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Adem for New York
body:
https://www.adembunkeddeko.com/ [https://www.adembunkeddeko.com/]
https://www.instagram.com/reel/DS-6-EiEqxr/?igsh=MWQ2c2FkMTM1Y2NuMQ== [https://www.instagram.com/reel/DS-6-EiEqxr/?igsh=MWQ2c2FkMTM1Y2NuMQ==]
Peter,
I was about to do something really uncomfortable. Like...Polar Plunge uncomfortable.
But then I realized New Yorkers are already doing something worse every day:
We’re watching our quality of life plunge while the cost of living keeps rising.
Rent up.
Groceries up.
Transit unreliable.
Energy bills up.
Wages not keeping up.
That’s why I’m running for New York State Comptroller. The office that controls nearly $300 billion in public money and can actually be used to fix what’s broken: housing, transit, energy, and opportunity.
Hitting 500 donors is what lets us take this message statewide and force a real conversation about how New York uses its money. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/polarplungeemail]
If you want to help even more: Send this link to two New Yorkers and ask them to chip in $5 too. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/polarplungeemail]
That’s how small support turns into real power.
With gratitude,
Adem
Paid for by Adem for New York
Adem for New York
P.O. Box 130-427,
Brooklyn, NY 11213

subject: People showing up
body:

Happy New Year,
Peter!

Last month, supporters like you helped close out the year strong to defend
our progressive champions and push bold policies that protect working
families, expand justice, and create a democracy that works for all.

This is your chance to join a movement that
delivers,
Peter. Your support gives the
Squad the power to challenge entrenched elites, defend democracy, and make
sure progress reaches everyone — not just the privileged
few.

Change doesn’t happen by waiting — it happens because people show up. The
far-right is ramping up attacks, and the next battles will be fierce. But
the Squad is showing up, every day, against Trump, his allies, and anyone
who threatens justice.

And together, we can defend our democracy and make sure no one is left
behind.

Thank you for standing with us,

The Squad Victory Fund

Alexandria, Ayanna, Ilhan, and Rashida are standing up to Trump, MAGA
forces, and anyone trying to drag our country backward — but they can’t
do it alone.

name: Redistricting Action
subject: The work your support makes possible
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
This outpouring of support sends a resounding message that the American people will be heard.
|
---

_Today, we're in the midst of a redistricting crisis — and our democracy needs to be actively defended every day. That's why All On The Line is now**Redistricting Action** — a grassroots movement built for the critical fights ahead. Thank you for being part of it._
Peter,
**We did it: Together, we reached our goal of raising $50,000 before the end of the year — and that support will now be matched dollar-for-dollar, resources that will be critical in the days ahead.**
From all of us at Redistricting Action, thank you for this outpouring of support. It sends a clear and resounding message that Americans will not let cynical politicians silence us.
We aren’t wasting a moment putting these resources to use. Concrete threats are knocking at our door, and we’re deploying our grassroots movement to meet them:
* **Florida** is accelerating their push to redraw their congressional map, and we expect that the new map will suppress the voices of communities of color. Keep in mind they already have a deeply gerrymandered map — something that will get worse if map manipulators get their way.

* **Missouri** citizens rose up and gathered over 300,000 signatures to put the state’s gerrymandered map on the ballot. Despite this display of democracy at work, anti-democracy forces are doing their best to shut it down — and planning to spend millions to defeat the initiative.

* **Kansas** legislative leaders have vowed to consider redistricting in their session that begins in January, and have set their sights on Representative Sharice Davids’ seat — the lone Democrat representing the state in Congress.

Redistricting Action is responding to all of these concrete threats rising in state legislatures. Meanwhile, we’re keeping a close watch on the Supreme Court, which will rule soon on a case that could strike at the heart of the Voting Rights Act, the crown jewel of the civil rights movement. Our affiliate has been part of the effort to battle this out in court since the beginning of this case — and Redistricting Action is preparing to dive into action as soon as the ruling comes down.
**Your support is enabling us to take on these known fights, and whatever unknown fights lie ahead, Peter._Thank you_. **
From all of us at Redistricting Action, we wish you a happy and healthy New Year.
— The Redistricting Action Team

TO: House Democratic Caucus
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank you! **_Dear House Democrats – you make me proud to be a Democrat._**

Your fight to IMPEACH Trump’s stooges Pete Hegseth and RFK Jr. is exactly what our country needs right now.

The American people are sick and tired of Hegseth and RFK Jr.’s inexperience, dangerous lies, and life-threatening policies!

**This news gives me hope that we WILL hold them accountable — and stand up to Trump’s authoritarianism once and for all.**

**I’m so grateful to have you leading the way!**

[**That’s why I’m signing this card and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my appreciation and to help House Democrats FLIP the few seats we need to take back the majority »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/100642?t=9&akid=22450%2E878179%2EhKvYoN) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/100642?t=10&akid=22450%2E878179%2EhKvYoN)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

# **EXCLUSIVE OFFER**
#

# **FROM THE DESK OF DONALD J. TRUMP**
---
[47th President Founders Club](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
Dear Friend,
President Trump requests your presence in the 47th President Founders Club.

[Accept invitation to the 47th President Founders Club](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
You’re not asleep!
But yes, most people would dream of receiving an email like this one.

[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
[Accept invitation here:](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
I personally created the **47th President Founders Club** for one reason only:
To permanently honor the patriots who founded and carried the entire MAGA movement from Day One! The ones who never wavered, never surrendered, and refused to let them destroy our country twice.
I had my team pull the very best files, millions of patriot names, and I went through them myself.
**Your name rose straight to the top.**
That’s why I’m personally inviting you to become a Charter Member of **my 47th President Founders Club**.

[CONGRATULATIONS!](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
Only 4,700 spots exist in the entire country. I’m holding one for you!
**_[But only for the next 24 hours you can claim your spot: ACT FAST>](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)_**
Don’t miss your shot to stand with the patriots who made the greatest comeback in American history.
Your name could be one of them.
I am counting on you. Don’t let me down.
Thank you and God bless you,
President Trump

name: Chip Roy
subject: No to Sharia Law
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEXANS FOR CHIP ROY
body:
America is facing a threat that directly attacks our Constitution and our Western values: the spread of Sharia law. | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1ce93b65008b49aa9fec297d8ae2f718&_e=bJL88zxFVJPzP7A1QLB2mTPINQlBcDyulOYy5HeHkn0d5XnwdtQRDHy_L4oe1X9a-4WE6tT2dvS1utB0GR4_337Pd3deaM04WVkxXhkHdau3Npz-4NN_8PAl2NX0GETh3B-GziG3rH45HZFsrymKG_rQr0-6PRf77uVsad_c3ZSgEpr0Lai9JSwF18rkDfN0qYSESWVeUbw1TzLsMFk3ABiSufnRn7p-8Km2XkCRlljHao3_EtNcATQK70UKkYwI1x5LSFnLzUhEuTsrUr-cbtsrQaORRDCnZUUJIYECe_6Gmvmng4UTlstcHBmVa5-bV37hIjWUAez1OX0nFllzrDLKSaeLbQ6ZWx86rEq151ermIDn7FLHNFoW9N57wlEt4B0HDlIKESPOjFM2AN1cLrcddUJ50w-B0gMo_g8VAv9WQRUhPp3YNM_Mp1ymmtO_uGOFlLzA1Te9zj7HDxodnEGB5fyXqZnAQjXIZd7vSbQ1WKRAml7faHo-HIWM_pJlBiOSepEeWD_zTARjluwBV5VqvY7gTLHdq-Zocvzhw3fNK1e9GiU7I4O8BYuGHitSUl6GdzcZ9RUMz6f6Iibm7MGP8uhlgRsblGE-ufLo-bkS_bSXeT0ggUt1VxejGd-s5H9jPKRvxmxhEf-LbmB5brhOZi4Vb9189SPhYDgLy2aSskxxLG8GUFGd82nho9iS)
Fellow American,

We are facing a massive threat to American society and Western values: **Sharia law.**

From Texas to every state in this constitutional republic, instances of Sharia adherents masquerading as 'refugees' - and in many cases, sleeper cells connected to terrorist organizations - are threatening the American way of life.

**That's why I am working in Washington to keep America Sharia Free.**

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1ce93b65008b49aa9fec297d8ae2f718&_e=bJL88zxFVJPzP7A1QLB2mTPINQlBcDyulOYy5HeHkn0d5XnwdtQRDHy_L4oe1X9a-4WE6tT2dvS1utB0GR4_337Pd3deaM04WVkxXhkHdau3Npz-4NN_8PAl2NX0GETh3B-GziG3rH45HZFsrymKG_rQr0-6PRf77uVsad_c3ZSgEpr0Lai9JSwF18rkDfN0qYSESWVeUbw1TzLsMFk3ABiSufnRn7p-8Km2XkCRlliUX_DPhYKSwQWM0G2dL49Y0j2MH-e-OJK1Fise66bsZW6wrVOCwWv8XfZVxGNK_gbN5tDnAHAa20rTS28U8IjSfscVj5qHoiGiJaTITR6dCfRC7rJNGGeS9h8vulkaN376R-_h0Qli1XeuyVUa6pdBZdQhVg7bSdk5CORvSMfW3HAqMj_BXlhJ0ATvaKB0DSakcnXsLKy3s659NtBewrF2UNNvlMci_szlcsSTXQYhxu_KiWiPoPbGV535qD1OvB2f8ljSj551lIUGLWdiTDoYU3SAT7A22OsM8IAXxbaV8jwIj8q1-tU1YN2GfeI2fdIsGVs6VPznwFOOfEebt9NOcplYiYznJrLRfVUobeertRXx5bbXPJSG8Lg79DEFmDAft9F_-DDo_0W8ngrtuhurgVIFsVReQNhBPGPz433tbVrk9Jeub8nUBiYicl8xXN3biP6A1kJlQVdNxkMfqtjL)
Sharia law is in direct contradiction to Western civilization, our Constitution, and the rule of law. We need to stand up on the rooftops and say that our Judeo-Christian country is not going to be infiltrated by people who seek to undermine it.

Fellow American, we have to take the fight to the courts. We cannot allow this political ideology to seek to replace our legal system and Constitution.

_**This is why I am running for Attorney General.**_ As Texas's top law enforcement officer, I will fight every day to put _America_ and _Americans_ First. I'll fight to protect our Constitution. I am fighting for you.

**[But I need your help. RIGHT. NOW.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1ce93b65008b49aa9fec297d8ae2f718&_e=bJL88zxFVJPzP7A1QLB2mTPINQlBcDyulOYy5HeHkn0d5XnwdtQRDHy_L4oe1X9a-4WE6tT2dvS1utB0GR4_337Pd3deaM04WVkxXhkHdau3Npz-4NN_8PAl2NX0GETh3B-GziG3rH45HZFsrymKG_rQr0-6PRf77uVsad_c3ZSgEpr0Lai9JSwF18rkDfN0qYSESWVeUbw1TzLsMFk3ABiSufnRn7p-8Km2XkCRlljKVSPUpYWy0pOnAtd0U1O-oIXrVlbHYXbyDLr9Kl5c730FVsGB_BKgWvC-Rh4msD8rM1qmV0teSxuPm51WRHdq5Qe-jOYHFW_CM6a_X9RDQ8j_euYtgz_cJWeC_aVcBMfxMp0ctAm-rDdoh-eU0GH92M5BsEcOE5O9GrLDgiMLE433zQ-GfEUJsSRLsj6lRmzO4qTVnlLZxivVpuKIT2uQvdo5vf3Aw9X58fHRboLCLrENn_gHYszygIx3yD5TbMwO91UjlsQfFq8TJlY3ljZA9X_Jlk6zOXe000V_7K3bB8YXHQ0eWAac4j_e9eTn1xoM2xIKUDV6Yu22QdH4Vihz62Ndi-wh0rApAz2Y5CMZFp75hSe-DoUCexJOvfpXhVwfknX5qa-Yx6JyXrr0P6n4DuEcBYRF2fwDk8X5NblZPvS5A0nJepdbRF56uTo5UscEFTKzbOfmWPXmaFXti0FI)**

The Left is coming after me for criticizing Sharia Law. They call it 'Islamophobia.' But I've seen what's happening in Europe, Australia, and the civilized world.

clean_body: America is facing a threat that directly attacks our Constitution and our Western values: the spread of Sharia law. | Fellow American, We are facing a massive threat to American society and Western values: Sharia law. From Texas to every state in this constitutional republic, instances of Sharia adherents masquerading as 'refugees' - and in many cases, sleeper cells connected to terrorist organizations - are threatening the American way of life. That's why I am working in Washington to keep America Sharia Free. Sharia law is in direct contradiction to Western civilization, our Constitution, and the rule of law. We need to stand up on the rooftops and say that our Judeo-Christian country is not going to be infiltrated by people who seek to undermine it. Fellow American, we have to take the fight to the courts. We cannot allow this political ideology to seek to replace our legal system and Constitution. This is why I am running for Attorney General. As Texas's top law enforcement officer, I will fight every day to put America and Americans First. I'll fight to protect our Constitution. I am fighting for you. The Left is coming after me for criticizing Sharia Law. They call it 'Islamophobia.' But I've seen what's happening in Europe, Australia, and the civilized world. Thank you for taking action. Chip Roy | | PAID FOR BY TEXANS FOR CHIP ROY Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

body:
In a move that sent cultural shockwaves through both the entertainment world and political media, Nicki Minaj took the stage at Turning Point USA’s AmericaFest just days before Christmas — and what followed has ignited a firestorm across ideological and generational divides. Minaj, never one to shy away from controversy, stunned many of her Hollywood [...] | [](http://trk.libertyledger._ZD01In0/Pwx-Wm7sRAO4wH-hmKVRcA)

# **[Pop Star Facing Backlash After Decision](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/q_AVsm3Ahkvleb1RFdoRrA)**
---
In a move that sent cultural shockwaves through both the entertainment world and political media, Nicki Minaj took the stage at Turning Point USA’s AmericaFest just days before Christmas — and what followed has ignited a firestorm across ideological and generational divides. Minaj, never one to shy away from controversy, stunned many of her Hollywood [...]

[](http://trk.libertyledger._0T8Q12Oqr5x0qQ)
# **[Phillip Comments On Fraud Allegations](http://trk.libertyledger._0T8Q12Oqr5x0qQ)**
---
On Monday night’s CNN NewsNight, host Abby Phillip stepped squarely into the political crossfire surrounding the long-running welfare fraud scandal in Minnesota — a controversy that has recently gained fresh traction among conservatives, despite its roots stretching back nearly a decade. “The idea that this has not been investigated is completely bunk,” Phillip declared on-air, [...]
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger._0T8Q12Oqr5x0qQ)
[](http://trk.libertyledger.)
---
[](http://trk.libertyledger._sMffhmvthzZhplNHRkfQ)
# **[Federal Lawsuit Filed Against Senator](http://trk.libertyledger._sMffhmvthzZhplNHRkfQ)**
---
It’s almost surreal watching Minnesota’s Democratic political establishment unravel — not in drips, but in full-on buckets. You’d think after the explosion of the daycare and welfare fraud scandals, the allegations of federal funds getting funneled overseas, and the growing number of whistleblower retaliation claims, things might quiet down. But no — the hits just [...]
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger._sMffhmvthzZhplNHRkfQ)
[](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/LwcarAUkx4bSjYVVPOZIBA)
# **[Bondi Comments On Fraud Investigations](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/LwcarAUkx4bSjYVVPOZIBA)**
---
It started as whispers — quiet suspicions, murmured warnings, hushed questions about how certain childcare centers in Minnesota, many linked to Somali operators, could possibly be raking in millions in taxpayer dollars while appearing utterly deserted. But now, what was once a murky concern has erupted into a full-blown scandal, with billions — yes, billions [...]
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/LwcarAUkx4bSjYVVPOZIBA)
[](http://trk.libertyledger.-6vQgoC9g6AqRhG0Q)
# **[Warren Asked About Statements She Previously Made](http://trk.libertyledger.-6vQgoC9g6AqRhG0Q)**
---
It’s always interesting—if not a little exhausting—when the same voices who once defended censorship suddenly pretend they’ve always been champions of free speech. The latest example? Senator Elizabeth Warren, who’s now waving the “anti-censorship” banner as if her party wasn’t neck-deep in silencing dissent just a few years ago. Everyone who spoke up against Trump’s [...]
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger.-6vQgoC9g6AqRhG0Q)
[](http://trk.libertyledger.-SrkTf4lugA)
# **[Video Raises Further Allegations](http://trk.libertyledger.-SrkTf4lugA)**
---
It’s the kind of story that seems almost too brazen to be real—until you see the footage. Empty daycare centers, lights off, doors locked, misspelled signs, and not a single child in sight. And yet these “facilities” are receiving millions of taxpayer dollars. Not hundreds, not thousands—millions. The ongoing fraud scandal in Minnesota has erupted [...]
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger.-SrkTf4lugA)
[](http://trk.libertyledger.)

name: Kris Mayes
subject: Trump is abandoning Arizona
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE ARIZONA DEMOCRATIC PARTY
body:
I talked with MS NOW about how the Trump administration is abandoning Arizona's fight against drug cartels. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122547124/592815380/-1397648958?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_TAN_VIP_AC_20260102_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWIyYWQyZWYtMGVlOC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SkgAj9HbG2uY5rb0YCFEq_cclbtDUiqnF06TfAZN590=)
---
Hi there, It's Arizona Attorney General Kris Mayes. As you may have heard me say before, Arizona is the fentanyl funnel for America. _More than half of all fentanyl seized in this country comes through my state._ And we've seized more than 27 million pills since I became Attorney General. **But here’s the thing: Attorney General Pam Bondi and Trump are abandoning Arizona's fight against drug cartels.** After I sent a letter to Bondi requesting an additional 50 DEA agents for Arizona**,** she actually took 60 DEA agents OUT of Arizona. I wrote an op-ed and went on MS NOW to tell this story: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122547125/592815381/727665197?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_TAN_VIP_AC_20260102_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWIyYWQyZWYtMGVlOC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SkgAj9HbG2uY5rb0YCFEq_cclbtDUiqnF06TfAZN590=) Bondi moved these agents to places like Washington, D.C., so they could patrol Foggy Bottom, pick up trash, and terrorize immigrants. That is not what we need. We have one out of every 10 prosecutors now doing immigration enforcement when they should be going after drug cartels. Federal drug prosecutions are down 10%. CBP checkpoints along major trafficking routes are going unattended. **And meanwhile, Trump pardoned the former President of Honduras, who bragged about stuffing "drugs up the gringos' noses" after flooding 500 tons of cocaine into the U.S.** This is no laughing matter. More than 40% of Americans know someone who died from a drug overdose. Arizona is doing our part every day to fight the cartels and stop the flow of fentanyl. But we can't do this alone. Now, I'm asking Trump and Bondi to return those agents to Arizona and do their actual jobs. **We need federal law enforcement focused on actual criminals — cartel members and drug dealers.** [**If you agree, please consider splitting a contribution between AZ Dems and my re-election campaign.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122547126/592815382/727665197?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_TAN_VIP_AC_20260102_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWIyYWQyZWYtMGVlOC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SkgAj9HbG2uY5rb0YCFEq_cclbtDUiqnF06TfAZN590=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to the Arizona Democratic Party and Kris Mayes will go through immediately:_ | | [PITCH IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122547127/592815383/-1870620521?amount=10&express_lane=true&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_TAN_VIP_AC_20260102_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWIyYWQyZWYtMGVlOC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SkgAj9HbG2uY5rb0YCFEq_cclbtDUiqnF06TfAZN590=)

name: VoteVets.org
subject: A humble request: $5 for VoteVets
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
#
$5, Peter.
Yes, just $5 for VoteVets.
That’s what we need you to chip in today, because January is one of the hardest months of the entire year for fundraising.
But 2026 has to be different. VoteVets is one of the most powerful organizations on the left, and everyone is going to be watching us as we rush towards the elections this November.
So, yes: $5 because we ran through the tape last year and spent millions winning races around the country.
$5 because we have plans to spend millions more taking back the House and Senate in 2026.
$5 because VoteVets is one of the only organizations that can reach the voters we need to turn out to have any chance at victory in November.
And, yes, $5 because we want to show everyone — the media, our allies, and our opponents — that we’re entering 2026 ready to fight like hell for our country.
**[So, please. Chip in $5 to VoteVets and help us start 2026 strong.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-jan26.F9DuEZ&refcode=em260102-1-160&t=1&akid=34852%2E3013755%2EIPyTPV)

name: Nicolaus for Virginia
subject: Can we count on your $25 today?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NICOLAUS FOR VIRGINIA
body:
Help us reach every voter across Virginia’s 2nd District.

| | | [ ](https://home.nickva2.com/r?u=3uX8AZ74PTf-AC8x1wnWyErMqPy9iiBLJ42jqhhrKBM&e=b524fa9ebb357169266b26536ad7b9f7&utm_source=nickva2&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=25_today_workflow&n=1)
---
Friend, Every voter deserves to hear our message: affordable healthcare, real support for families, and a stronger democracy. But reaching every door, every phone, and every inbox takes resources. That’s where you come in. A $25 gift today helps us:
* Print and distribute voter guides
* Train canvassers and volunteers
* Expand our online outreach

[**Chip in $25**](https://home.nickva2.com/r?u=H-5dn2pGB-ut0b6hcVjVsOWWXoWfZwZbCtzJlfjZMEGMBTmxVffLpUKkG79-A7g-06CHel-pEPNFC1pbAvIo9qvjIY0PDJLUbcpNx2fR8i4&e=b524fa9ebb357169266b26536ad7b9f7&utm_source=nickva2&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=25_today_workflow&n=2) We can’t match Jen Kiggans’ big-money donors dollar for dollar, but with small donations from supporters like you, we will build a people-powered movement to win this district. Together, we’ll prove we’re **Stronger As One**. – Nicolaus

name: James Carville
subject: Republicans are in spitting distance of stealing New Hampshire’s Senate seat.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
If we lose New Hampshire, we lose any shot at flipping the Senate. Period.
Folks, it’s James Carville.
If I had any hair, I’d be ripping it out right now!!
Democrats’ chances of winning the New Hampshire Senate race have _officially been downgraded.**That means Republicans are in spitting distance of flipping this seat and cutting off ANY chance Democrats have of retaking control of the Senate._**
**[Before you read another word, chip in $5 to help Chris Pappas hold the line in New Hampshire.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/221?c0=em_ms_cp_20260102_1.0dqQ3u&refcode=em20260102-1&t=1&akid=4353%2E582294%2EvpI6fB)**
**[Rush $5 to Chris Pappas Right Now!](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260102_1.06g7-E&amount=5&refcode=em20260102-1&t=2&akid=4353%2E582294%2EvpI6fB)**
Let me be crystal clear. If Democrats blow it in New Hampshire, we have NO path to taking back the Senate. Not a snowball’s chance in hell.
Any guess who the GOP recruited into the race? John Sununu. Yes, that same Sununu family. John’s got the famous last name, he’s got Wall Street’s money, and he’s got the full force of the national Republican establishment behind him.
Chris Pappas is the only thing standing in their way. Chris isn’t some lightweight. He’s won one of the toughest Congressional districts in the country four times running. He knows how to fight and win.
**_But — with Sununu in the race — if we don’t rally around Chris Pappas right now, we’re going to get steamrolled!_**
So here’s what I need from you: **[Chip in $5, or more if you can, to help Chris Pappas fight back and hold this seat for the Democrats.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/221?c0=em_ms_cp_20260102_1.0dqQ3u&refcode=em20260102-1&t=3&akid=4353%2E582294%2EvpI6fB)**
**[Rush $5 to Chris Pappas Right Now!](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260102_1.06g7-E&amount=5&refcode=em20260102-1&t=4&akid=4353%2E582294%2EvpI6fB)**
_This is the GOP’s dream scenario:_ an open seat in a swing state, a big-name Republican, and a whole lot of dark money to burn. I know from my years of campaigning that this is exactly what they were hoping for.
**It’s time to get off our butts and fight like hell for Chris.** Let’s show these Republican bigshots that they can’t just waltz in and buy New Hampshire. Not on our watch.
**[Give what you can right now.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/221?c0=em_ms_cp_20260102_1.0dqQ3u&refcode=em20260102-1&t=5&akid=4353%2E582294%2EvpI6fB)** Let’s win this damn thing and flip the Senate.
— James Carville
[](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/221?c0=em_ms_cp_20260102_1.0dqQ3u&refcode=em20260102-1&t=6&akid=4353%2E582294%2EvpI6fB)
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer?refcode=em20260102-1&t=7&refcode2=4353_582294_vpI6fB&akid=4353%2E582294%2EvpI6fB)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=8&akid=4353%2E582294%2EvpI6fB)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_update_your_information/?t=9&akid=4353%2E582294%2EvpI6fB)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrispappas.org/unsubscribe/cps_unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=4353%2E582294%2EvpI6fB)

Email us: [teampappas@chrispappas.org](mailto:teampappas@chrispappas.org)
Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
Chris Pappas for Senate
PO Box 313
Manchester, NH 03105
United States

name: Valerie Foushee
subject: We’re stronger together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Foushee for Congress
body:
Your support means more than you know.

If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/9_07fM1dnEmqdVR1wv8kcQ2?unsubscribedata=RlzVmPZOtXo23onfvN2HeY%2FJWxg3I3kVJ0A40LbrwWeyYqdiQ3auMkOFSuZhQvOosaUJSqyQITNYEHbbl8xVFL3L2LTCkdr16YLtTto4ER2hhmFRawVMUL3NYu3ZSmE7eDRyPvPthyySoTvRry%2BeIYZhEOt1JhybUkgMsMyH2uQAu%2B%2ByqGNZ6eQQVcmxo74O38k6nainpp2lXaGKXjv9zQI5OetULNsM3vwdcPZovSmRtiDgMq3ZtCDOV4tWSEjxRyemIECvK0hYGo1tT3jdLstz%2FBLsVJeZeoGyQghDEUz%2BnyeSMQ%2BWd%2FN6hg4%2BP%2Bf1PWb5BitX49H9LDihXFEGu27o%2Fs%2Bpi%2FXn9F4BrGjH%2BRr%2BZXJSLov8lffovrmizalj8drCWtbahstT46DTBg3pkU8qAlia1uAh0k7rg%2F023dw%3D)

Peter, it's Valerie. I hope the holidays gave you a chance to recharge and more than anything, that you were able to spend meaningful time with the people who matter most to you as we head into the new year. As we all get back into our regular day-to-day routines, I need to say thank you for helping us reach our end-of-quarter goal. This was an important milestone for our campaign ahead of this year’s election, and it wouldn't have been possible without you. I can’t tell you what it means to know that you have my back. But of course, our work doesn't stop now. With every outrageous headline out of Washington, and every time Republicans turn their backs on working people, it becomes even clearer: we _must_ retake the House majority. While the road ahead won’t be easy, I can’t overstate how much it means to know you’re in this with me. Your support is a powerful reminder that none of us stands alone in this fight. And if there’s one thing I want you to know, it’s this: I’ll always have your back, too. When we stand together, when we refuse to back down, we are stronger than those who are trying to divide or silence us. With gratitude, Valerie Foushee

clean_body: Your support means more than you know. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Peter, it's Valerie. I hope the holidays gave you a chance to recharge and more than anything, that you were able to spend meaningful time with the people who matter most to you as we head into the new year. As we all get back into our regular day-to-day routines, I need to say thank you for helping us reach our end-of-quarter goal. This was an important milestone for our campaign ahead of this year’s election, and it wouldn't have been possible without you. I can’t tell you what it means to know that you have my back. But of course, our work doesn't stop now. With every outrageous headline out of Washington, and every time Republicans turn their backs on working people, it becomes even clearer: we must retake the House majority. While the road ahead won’t be easy, I can’t overstate how much it means to know you’re in this with me. Your support is a powerful reminder that none of us stands alone in this fight. And if there’s one thing I want you to know, it’s this: I’ll always have your back, too. When we stand together, when we refuse to back down, we are stronger than those who are trying to divide or silence us. With gratitude, Valerie Foushee * | | | ---|---|--- = Valerie is fighting to protect access to health care, working families, and to reform our criminal justice system. | Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23778%2E4449941%2Ehr5mR0) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23778%2E4449941%2Ehr5mR0) **BREAKING from _Deadline:_
[_“MSNBC_ Makes The Shift To _MS NOW_ As Part Of Split From _Comcast_ ”](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71672?t=3&akid=23778%2E4449941%2Ehr5mR0)** [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71672?t=4&akid=23778%2E4449941%2Ehr5mR0) [**Please confirm: Do you still watch _MSNBC_ after becoming _MS NOW?_ >>**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71672?t=5&akid=23778%2E4449941%2Ehr5mR0) | | | [YES ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71672?t=6&akid=23778%2E4449941%2Ehr5mR0)

---
_** Please, your response is critical. We need to ensure that Democrats across the country are still tuning into_ MS NOW! **_
We’re still in SHOCK team... this news comes after multiple other networks have bent the knee to Trump and his MAGA allies this past year!

**REMEMBER:** _CBS_ caved and fired Stephen Colbert for being outspoken about the Trump administration.

**REMEMBER:** _ABC_ sidelined Jimmy Kimmel for making comments that MAGA disagreed with.

**AND REMEMBER:** _NBC_ is now scrubbing _MSNBC_ from its brand – despite _MSNBC_ being a critical network millions trust to hold Republicans accountable.

We can’t afford to lose one of the few remaining progressive voices on national television, but we’re nervous that Democrats like you, team, are going to tune out after this shakeup.
[**So we’re launching a rapid response poll to [50] of our most informed Democrats in your area to gauge their support for _MS NOW._ _Please respond before 11:59 PM to validate our data >>_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71672?t=9&akid=23778%2E4449941%2Ehr5mR0)

Fight For Reform

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=595b421c777d4bfebee5111d6bd72d24&_e=jHnm9xMI3a3zWMBzvtBR6G2W6isPpiByX8XCmPhaphnbqCMReDRyP-O2BzfNy0uxOfIx2znY7dibwFqDlybYFgqcBDfNSQeIJy52cJX0y14ox4zvl37c7mJVPaufExnaD8iNWGs-Hivi1b-1VdBY2L6QOQgExiHI7_uWvHww8b51BJhZcotqCOCVvSmf49or_X3sDXPGsfOMRKRSbBjFq1JOfXSUvRHG50yKaz0V8rCvwpVBTsOt7kIrVK0NjN0kJOSX1Jc3tjPdFtDVPT-o681QSnILqgvIBoHffI20FEx5enFsGbVILHFpWujfnon8Eanj_st2CTB_QMW4X1Lov1K4jEg9zHScv2YGZWsfATRyyIaQEuoEytVDTj41HahiIGLZNzXBUDUyvJqzbeSrVY_yKdbhguFKpX1vcfmaWe2iLLYJSUSRR7m-Ou-9kprBkoXr2rscdDOUTJ19clRAh0KkfeDq_rfWhE1FXAv86nOJylzAwoU8nDNtElSMS5HTAqQrB_4shfDeGxC-bfSjm-QdL5-zXTBSC_O3PosnW1TEMEf56h9WwR4Q-hO-YQho)

name: Abdul El-Sayed
subject: “How are you going to pay for it?”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1001&akid=1505%2E251025%2E7QlVJ3 ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1002&akid=1505%2E251025%2E7QlVJ3 ]Abdul for US Senate

Hey Peter, I
have a question for you.

Do you know what happens if you tax a billionaire at 8%?

They’re still a billionaire!

Plus, the money from that tax goes toward ensuring that we all have safe
roads to drive on, that all of our kids can go to good schools, and that
we all have access to healthcare.

Now, with that in mind, another quick question:

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/survey/billionaire-survey/?source=em20260102-1502&akid=1505%2E251025%2E7QlVJ3 ]Should we tax billionaires?

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/survey/billionaire-survey/?source=em20260102-1502&akid=1505%2E251025%2E7QlVJ3 ]YES

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/survey/billionaire-survey/?source=em20260102-1502&akid=1505%2E251025%2E7QlVJ3 ]NO

My answer is simple. I believe that in a moment of deep inequality, we
should have a billionaire tax.

If you’re making hundreds of millions of dollars every year, you can
afford to pay a little more in taxes so that we can all live better lives
— and even then, your kids’ kids’ kids will still be rich.

The only thing that’s stopping us from pursuing this and building a better
future is our broken political system — one that lets corporations and
billionaires buy off politicians to protect their vast wealth.

But one volunteer, one donor, one supporter at a time, our movement is
changing the status quo and fighting for an economy that isn’t rigged
against working people.

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/survey/billionaire-survey/?source=em20260102-1502&akid=1505%2E251025%2E7QlVJ3 ]If you’re with me and believe that we should implement a billionaire
tax, add your name by clicking here.

Thank you,

Abdul

subject: The fate of Democracy hinges on obscure 2026 elections
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019CugD3-zQzGSS2wS26K5xK-BPjikeEAEtYyMNkI-kVFazg_K87E1M2NnesOhgUD7-bL9cMGLr7wDaUPYdDmCkOyq1jECg1Zosjqdzw28OqobEuBro2CqzYneOGBYq1VyKSlObMuqnwl8LX9jQqKrReaFcaH7M6rIc7QDU8hLW3lSByCpu1qoX96kR-dC5CksuMA3xNCGxFh9Q4dMJpy2FT9L6vZoetW9E47wLGsQvIw=&c=X8VaTPKwETe1UT-2jSIh1BJsgQSj0qJewBmTWAUE4C1agYxua7IAow==&ch=eN2GqoQmkjF-0bQ4Slw6lreS75LwUCa7cQ6sq5mI46Pgh08r-Ivo3Q==)
---
| Peter,
2026 is a make or break election year for democracy.
All of the talking heads are talking about the House and Senate elections, and yes, those will be consequential. But here's the truth most political pundits and election analysts are missing:
The fate of Democracy will also hinge on often overlooked and underappreciated state Supreme Courts races.
As MAGA witnessed the formation of a massive blue wave in 2025, they started working on desperate countermeasures, launching an all-out blitz of anti-democratic election rigging efforts at the state level--rewriting elections laws to make it harder for Democrats to vote and gerrymandering maps.
The constitutionality of their actions will ultimately be decided by state Supreme Courts. That means whoever controls these courts will control the fate of our Democracy:

---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019CugD3-zQzGSS2wS26K5xK-BPjikeEAEtYyMNkI-kVFazg_K87E1M2NnesOhgUD7-bL9cMGLr7wDaUPYdDmCkOyq1jECg1Zosjqdzw28OqobEuBro2CqzYneOGBYq1VyKSlObMuqnwl8LX9jQqKrReaFcaH7M6rIc7QDU8hLW3lSByCpu1qoX96kR-dC5CksuMA3xNCGxFh9Q4dMJpy2FT9L6vZoetW9to4N--rGfIk=&c=X8VaTPKwETe1UT-2jSIh1BJsgQSj0qJewBmTWAUE4C1agYxua7IAow==&ch=eN2GqoQmkjF-0bQ4Slw6lreS75LwUCa7cQ6sq5mI46Pgh08r-Ivo3Q==)
---

32 states will have state Supreme Court elections in 2026 including the key swing states of Arizona, Michigan, Georgia, and Wisconsin. If MAGA loyalists capture these courts, they'll green-light voter suppression and rigged maps as "constitutional".
That's why Defend Our Courts is stepping up once again. In 2025, when control of the PA Supreme Court was on the line, we helped lead the defense of the court and secure a 30+ point victory for the Democratic justices.
Now we're taking that winning formula national.
The national party is going to be stretched thin. With dozens of competitive House and Senate races, state court elections will risk being ignored. We can't let that happen, not when the entire guardrail of democracy is on the line.
[The sooner we get moving, the stronger we'll be in every state. We need to start preparing our defense now and we can't do it alone. Will you rush a donation of $25, $10, or whatever you can spare to help defend these crucial courts in 2026?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019CugD3-zQzGSS2wS26K5xK-BPjikeEAEtYyMNkI-kVFazg_K87E1M2NnesOhgUD7-bL9cMGLr7wDaUPYdDmCkOyq1jECg1Zosjqdzw28OqobEuBro2CqzYneOGBYq1VyKSlObMuqnwl8LX9jQqKrReaFcaH7M6rIc7QDU8hLW3lSByCpu1qoX96kR-dC5CksuMA3xNCGxFh9Q4dMJpy2FT9L6vZoetW9zV7CbpRDS9o=&c=X8VaTPKwETe1UT-2jSIh1BJsgQSj0qJewBmTWAUE4C1agYxua7IAow==&ch=eN2GqoQmkjF-0bQ4Slw6lreS75LwUCa7cQ6sq5mI46Pgh08r-Ivo3Q==)

clean_body: | | | | | == | Peter, 2026 is a make or break election year for democracy. All of the talking heads are talking about the House and Senate elections, and yes, those will be consequential. But here's the truth most political pundits and election analysts are missing: The fate of Democracy will also hinge on often overlooked and underappreciated state Supreme Courts races. As MAGA witnessed the formation of a massive blue wave in 2025, they started working on desperate countermeasures, launching an all-out blitz of anti-democratic election rigging efforts at the state level--rewriting elections laws to make it harder for Democrats to vote and gerrymandering maps. The constitutionality of their actions will ultimately be decided by state Supreme Courts. That means whoever controls these courts will control the fate of our Democracy: | == 32 states will have state Supreme Court elections in 2026 including the key swing states of Arizona, Michigan, Georgia, and Wisconsin. If MAGA loyalists capture these courts, they'll green-light voter suppression and rigged maps as "constitutional". That's why Defend Our Courts is stepping up once again. In 2025, when control of the PA Supreme Court was on the line, we helped lead the defense of the court and secure a 30+ point victory for the Democratic justices. Now we're taking that winning formula national. The national party is going to be stretched thin. With dozens of competitive House and Senate races, state court elections will risk being ignored. We can't let that happen, not when the entire guardrail of democracy is on the line. == | | | == | == | == | | | == | == | == | | | | == | Whatever you can give truly makes a difference. Because if we lose the courts, we lose everything else. -- Defend our Courts | | | | | | | | | | == | | | | | == | | | | Mail checks to: | | | | Defend Our CourtsP.O. Box 45569 Philadelphia, PA 19149 US | | | | | PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE.

#
---
Happy New Year, Peter! I’m so thankful that you’re a part of this team. I know each of us had multiple priorities as we closed out the year — not to mention the worries caused by rising prices across the board — which is why I’m especially grateful that people like you stepped up to support this work during our last FEC fundraising deadline in 2025. Whether you made a donation, signed a petition, or simply kept up with this work by reading our emails, your support helped us enter this critical election year in a strong position. With everything that’s at stake in 2026, that’s exactly the approach we need to take moving forward. Billionaires and large corporations are already making plans to fund Republican campaigns — but with a strong grassroots team like this on our side, _they’ll know we aren’t going to back down._ We’ve overcome the odds so many times before, and with your continued support, we’ll have what it takes to fight back against whatever Republicans do to stop us. Friend,
---
Asking for help has never been my strong suit, but today, I’m asking that you spare just a minute of your time to understand my situation.
---
The Democrats and their Deep State thugs are cashing in on a years-long scheme to **JAIL** me for the rest of my life.
---
**A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
---
_As it stands, I’m simply out of options._
---
Several years ago, the Democrats began their plot by having Joe Biden’s FBI unlawfully raid my home at the crack of dawn.
---
Then, they had me unjustly arrested and booked in one of the most violent jails in America under _booking # 2313757_.
---
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0daac2c1552f4fefadddbf9e86330195&_e=Jtg5p9Oy5eYvO97XAntirdLfk6-psntE65Vi9u-mGeSdV5BsQh19R_e8r1UKHHrfkc0vTwSRBCcIH8IbR1qK0t0_Cf04LAK1bZ5iZyxjfkkVdExjcFM50cCumYBkxSo1T4Upru383aYlg9KaKj_aKZxfZYwzURjRG2ltgSe8mbJf4UqwvfDAKl9ox3Nby3yfpCyubO0fKxPK-nncnqMz8ydePYSS9bYDXvEhcT5hpSEM02VoGpHf5mXRvvynffkXjM4IyIH1o2Gn3I_6tAsNA_jCMOQkW-yQ5gpjjYMkQHSwVMY4poRIUzhvPKBE9mumm7dxlQFnSmJ5yamlKloyQHy9yfREl5JR86KGAh143DqRXzChwp_zVFqqD4lt_wJKqqCZMMNF2R_dkAKB-xE9sKNyE4JbrH9VAFTBJRsbx548XL9HlocjQzUJ3ngZZtVjjeYVOjY-uJVhJnm9XDxNUl9bAFjgFUGkTxOgZpPAr7IOQVSPET4NAsg_ronLJMJC7CWU8oXZXPFFwzAIy1UldnvOfTMuAeK5JUBRr0THo9nSP8PnEVwWwfl7bMNEeM9gu4w0vDJ5BbErqq_gigtoYRm7xW4n_Ff-nKgJ7y4zoFV9M3HI35TAlnJSMD9QdTHDCvB2LZxizgBfhzWzsQG14g%3D%3D)
__
---

But as the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from the Democrats’ impeachment witch hunt, I felt reassured in knowing I could **_at least defend myself_** from the Left’s bogus charges...
---
_...Or so I thought!_
---
**_The Democrats’ cronies even _STRIPPED_ me of my law licenses!_**
---
**Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for _state-level_ charges, no cavalry coming over the hill, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance was to secure a top-notch defense team.**
---
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
---
_They knew full well this was exactly the kind of defense I couldn’t afford!_
---
Friend, the situation I find myself in today is simple, but sadly, bleak.
---
My last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
---
That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust.
---

clean_body: This is the situation I’m caught in: | Friend, Asking for help has never been my strong suit, but today, I’m asking that you spare just a minute of your time to understand my situation. The Democrats and their Deep State thugs are cashing in on a years-long scheme to JAIL me for the rest of my life. A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a federal pardon in state court. As it stands, I’m simply out of options. Several years ago, the Democrats began their plot by having Joe Biden’s FBI unlawfully raid my home at the crack of dawn. Then, they had me unjustly arrested and booked in one of the most violent jails in America under booking # 2313757. But as the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from the Democrats’ impeachment witch hunt, I felt reassured in knowing I could at least defend myself from the Left’s bogus charges... ...Or so I thought! The Democrats’ cronies even STRIPPED me of my law licenses! Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for state-level charges, no cavalry coming over the hill, and no lifeline, my ONLY chance was to secure a top-notch defense team. But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of BANKRUPTCY. They knew full well this was exactly the kind of defense I couldn’t afford! Friend, the situation I find myself in today is simple, but sadly, bleak. My last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like YOU. That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

| | Charlie Kirk built a movement for truth -- but his final message pointed to something eternal.

It wasn't about politics... or elections... or even about the culture war.

His final book was deeply personal, and unlike anything Charlie had written before...

**It was about the Sabbath. **

About sacred rest. Reconnecting with God.

Charlie wrote this book because he knew what America was missing... and what he nearly lost himself.

He found that in a world addicted to busyness, noise, and scrolling...

_**The most radical act of resistance is to STOP. **_

To rest. To reflect. To return to God.

This book is his blueprint for how we do that -- as individuals, as families, and as a nation.

🔥 You'll discover how Charlie learned to honor the Sabbath in a culture that never stops
🔥 How setting aside just one day a week gave him clarity, peace, and strength
🔥 Why he believed this message could spark a spiritual revival across America

I know he would've wanted you to have this book.

**When you give today to Turning Point USA, you 're not just supporting the movement Charlie built -- you're helping pass on the message he felt most urgently in his final months. **

**[And we’ll ship you a copy of Charlie’s final book straight to your door.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=d5299fd5e8d44c9cb8d6fed191dc75c3&_e=EjZxhYH52_LRph7aYnUjwJ2eLPdZrZSxFWOi9d-ghA8GSgEiJ3j4Tm-cwq4u1s7rnjpYNOYilb8wikp-Zmw7Rt4xgkqivsqWmIroN4vf09x2wLbEQhS-LaKPgEQmDHKQd-sWzDQN7FOTNagtvFoK3bpqaTSw1GmkDQ0YAc8nlDla0Yjzuh9E8bVhz3fVWNi9w0wfvdAWKiBHbWNeLZ-NPGbvbroyU-5XLViSxvngp7BFwU2x1BsROan7Ipz7YjURmC93O0zD2bAPYiYcBpsIKDNVEt2aShZMiZhZGwhOdpxwoULvjXibNrjgIQeN52Je9rSmpega8MfT95FcloXJee1a2XdpcrEW7PAO4cmCZ4ZdOvECNAgf3DCd8Lvd94zeripdWZxWa7g1HwY3lprztcM1_dQ7mQv4kaAwD8qvDQIgS_9YWR1cY_Iqq-Skd8ApmIg39AMy_b9X4MXKNNY9HXBkThuuJB5v6cL1QiXc2fjOtdZS28CsFdpX-uWbLTX8cL0r7x5XIip6wtpSy6cNme26mWtYLQzo8dpdZNp-5VbNiGbhpdeHHzRSwyFYE3saqCOtjPLhWLa15FZ7d15JbFWaH21b_77VcZ-y_FV4q7PLzmUPbAVmR6cPE-sK48BLzAhHDulNvp2Ebx1cB37eWlP3Vc46I9LyaBpYoy9Zy-BsTOw_MFEyFjny7xB1IGFc)**

clean_body: The book Charlie left behind| | | | | Fellow Patriot, | | Charlie Kirk built a movement for truth -- but his final message pointed to something eternal. It wasn't about politics... or elections... or even about the culture war. His final book was deeply personal, and unlike anything Charlie had written before... It was about the Sabbath. About sacred rest. Reconnecting with God. Charlie wrote this book because he knew what America was missing... and what he nearly lost himself. He found that in a world addicted to busyness, noise, and scrolling... The most radical act of resistance is to STOP. To rest. To reflect. To return to God. This book is his blueprint for how we do that -- as individuals, as families, and as a nation. 🔥 You'll discover how Charlie learned to honor the Sabbath in a culture that never stops 🔥 How setting aside just one day a week gave him clarity, peace, and strength 🔥 Why he believed this message could spark a spiritual revival across America I know he would've wanted you to have this book. When you give today to Turning Point USA, you 're not just supporting the movement Charlie built -- you're helping pass on the message he felt most urgently in his final months. Fellow Patriot, thank you, in advance, for helping reach the next generation with truth, faith, and moral courage -- the very things Charlie gave his life for. And as you do, may the message of this book lead you -- just as it led Charlie -- to a deeper trust in God, a stronger love for your family, and a renewed peace in your own soul. For Charlie, Justin Streiff Chief Operating Officer Turning Point USA P.S. Charlie Kirk's final book, Stop, in the Name of God, is a heartfelt call to slow down, remember what's eternal, and rest in God. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

body:
Peter, Happy New Year!
Thanks to the support of donors like you, we crushed our end-of-year fundraising goal this week.
With your support, we’re one step closer to ending Trump’s MAGA trifecta and flipping the House this year.
Yet as we get closer to the critical midterm elections in November, it’s more important than ever that we keep up this momentum.
Remember: As Donald Trump ramps up his attacks on our fundamental rights, it’s crucial that we all band together to defend our democracy and hold him accountable.
So Peter, if you’re able, will you chip in $25 or anything you can afford to keep up the fight and stand with Zoe Lofgren? Your donation will support her re-election campaign so she can continue leading the fight against Donald Trump in Congress.

body:

| | Peter,
I need to alert you to something serious. National liberal groups are quietly moving huge amounts of outside money into Nebraska, and they’ve flagged **my race as a top target.** ****
Before I go further, please take a moment to help us push back:
---
[Counter outside interference →](https://link.win.lindstromforne._A/s3ua869fe6f)
This is not a rumor. It’s already happening. These groups are using national donor networks to overwhelm local voters and tilt our election in their direction. They believe Nebraska won’t respond and that they can buy influence here without anyone pushing back.
We cannot let that happen.
If we don’t act quickly, their spending will drown out Nebraska voices and reshape the outcome of this race long before Election Day. Your support right now is the only way to match their influence.
Please step up if you can:
**[Fight back against outside groups →](https://link.win.lindstromforne._A/s8mb71e9522)**
We’ve set a goal of bringing in **500 supporters in the next 12 hours** to show that Nebraska grassroots won’t be pushed aside by national operatives. Every contribution moves us closer.
Nebraska elections must belong to Nebraskans. I’m counting on you to stand with me and protect the integrity of our race.
Thank you,
Brett Lindstrom

---
| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him. **I 'm sure you've seen the news already...**
**Prop 50 - Gavin Newsom's blueprint that aims to dismantle election integrity in California - has officially passed.**
**Here 's what that means - and why it can go from a snowball in California to an AVALANCHE in the rest of the nation:**

I'm currently representing California's 20th District. I'm a proud MAGA conservative, and despite the circumstances, there's still hope to turn things around for good.**
