clean_body: , I 'm sure you've seen the news already... Prop 50 - Gavin Newsom's blueprint that aims to dismantle election integrity in California - has officially passed. Here 's what that means - and why it can go from a snowball in California to an AVALANCHE in the rest of the nation: 1 The Left's Power Grab is Made Legal: CA Democrats just rewrote the rules of democracy to keep themselves in power - they tore up fair maps and handed the pen back to their Democrat buddies, NOT to the people 2 5 Republican Seats Are in Danger: Critical seats that can make or break President Trump's House GOP Majority are now in danger of flipping blue. If we lose even just a couple of these seats, the Democrats can undo every historic piece of legislation President Trump has passed. 3 If They Can Do it in California, They Can Do it in YOUR State Next: Democrats are testing the playbook to see what they can get away with - and Prop 50 just paved the path to a permanent Democrat-controlled House. Their next stop? YOUR state, Peter. As a proud MAGA conservative and someone who's grown up here my whole life, I simply cannot stand idly by and watch this madness unfold. case we haven't met, my name's Vince Fong. I'm currently representing California's 20th District. I'm a proud MAGA conservative, and despite the circumstances, there's still hope to turn things around for good. You see, as someone who was JUST endorsed by President Trump himself, I 'm going to fight to keep the Left's paws off my seat and keep it red. Because if we keep even just one seat from flipping blue, we derail their political heist and throw a wrench in the Democrat Machine. can't let this defeat define us. name: Andrea Salinas
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
more to come

I want to say thank you. First, thank you for helping me reach our end-of-year fundraising goal. It’s officially election year, and your grassroots support is helping me start the year strong — and truly makes a difference in our fight to take back the House. This team has never, not once, let me down, and I cannot thank you enough. And second, I want to thank you for staying in this fight even when what we’re up against is exhausting and relentless. Donald Trump and the far-right spent the past year attacking our communities, but we never gave up hope. Because the truth is: Donald Trump is nowhere near as powerful as he pretends to be, and we’ve shown time and time again that when we stand united against him, he is beatable. We’ve shown up in historic numbers to protest Trump’s extremism and stand up for our communities. We’ve won court battles to stop Trump from abusing his power. And last November, Democrats said enough is enough and ushered in a historic blue wave in races across the country. We flipped seats in special elections and local races where no one would be competitive. Trump and Republicans may still hold the majority in Washington, but one thing is clear: the American people are ready for change — [**and I will not sit quietly as he continues to launch attack after attack.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122549195/592822461/1485128568?amount=6&refcode=email_010226_ty&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODA2ZDk1Mi0xZGU4LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k6F9PMRf5AIwug0gxGcNjiZwyceRuzXaUQ5z-9pIiX8=) [**We’ve got some more very tough fights ahead of us, and I can’t promise we’ll win all of them. But I can promise that I will keep fighting with everything I’ve got to stand up for you and for your democracy. And that, if we stay together in this fight, we will get through this and build a brighter future where right-wing extremists no longer get to control our government.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122549196/592822462/1485128568?amount=6&refcode=email_010226_ty&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODA2ZDk1Mi0xZGU4LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k6F9PMRf5AIwug0gxGcNjiZwyceRuzXaUQ5z-9pIiX8=) | | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122549197/592822463/1485128568?amount=6&refcode=email_010226_ty&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODA2ZDk1Mi0xZGU4LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k6F9PMRf5AIwug0gxGcNjiZwyceRuzXaUQ5z-9pIiX8=)

Thank you, happy New Year, and more to come.
-Andrea

name: The Feel Good Flyover
subject: Most Loved Feel Good Stories of 2025
body:
As you revel in the onset of a fresh new year, please enjoy this special edition of _The Feel Good Flyover_ as we look back at the most loved stories of 2025.

| | |
---
| [](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOqzAQRb_GdEFm7NiPwkWkiC6v3RIZPIZZDQwCiyR_v8r-wha3uzpHOl-P_hGJaZ3-xwVDnnJfsvQrPg_GUnDvFzkKy4kpI_Ikko4iO-EhPWhwF91cNPQpEr97W6WQEQFNhaHxzpt_3ltbzcF562IztN604JrRRd22g2m1RjDg0FYUPjTdaIDPTD3imI0f03XA6JJ1ympMVGSvv4XWMmPmt5y416MsFYe5lO1Q5qagU9Btu6yReJRlY3x9Lgq6kxJKvc2bMl3MmZhiQWXug3CKG74aBa5QUuaeOeMkCZOGO45wvVV7SNuTmOlwXlk9LZH411z-nOwM8BMAAP__55iCMw) | |
# Friday, January 2, 2026
---|---
**Good Afternoon!** As you revel in the onset of a fresh new year, please enjoy this special edition of _The Feel Good Flyover_ as we look back at the most loved stories of 2025. And don't forget to tune in to the [_Feel Good Flyover Podcast_](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGO8yAQBOCnwV0ssmBICopf-pXmlBTXXIkILDYnnI3Mxlbe_uR7hSummZG-Yr6u_hpKLY_xFmZ0ecyeM_kHbq0iMy5-psaVVkwZsY5EqTEtBRt5kGAO8niQ4FMo9e11l1xGBFQduqM1Vp2s1bqbnEl4GkwOWpkzZtD6HhHMMIQEEQCGrrhdk0cJsEf1EWNWNqbhjsEkbYSWmArT0n9TefCEub5pxaWPNHfVTczPJtQ_ARcBl23b-je9-HXHfd-bwHES6rIK9f_Tn9MHVgq32C0uPbdSa2nGCi3HOZT6S_Kfv1gd_AQAAP__87N1fA), where host Amy Hess explores what made these moments resonate--and why they still matter. Today's sponsor, [ProNail Complex](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOqzAQRb_GdEFm7NiPwkWkiC6v3RIZPIZZDQwCiyR_v8r-wha3uzpHOl-P_hGJaZ3-xwVDnnJfsvQrPg_GUnDvFzkKy4kpI_Ikko4iO-EhPWhwF91cNPQpEr97W6WQEQFNhaHxzpt_3ltbzcF562IztN604JrRRd22g2m1RjDg0FYUPjTdaIDPTD3imI0f03XA6JJ1ympMVGSvv4XWMmPmt5y416MsFYe5lO1Q5qagU9Btu6yReJRlY3x9Lgq6kxJKvc2bMl3MmZhiQWXug3CKG74aBa5QUuaeOeMkCZOGO45wvVV7SNuTmOlwXlk9LZH411z-nOwM8BMAAP__55iCMw), is sharing a surprisingly simple, natural approach that claims to help eliminate stubborn nail fungus and restore healthy-looking nails without harsh over-the-counter treatments.
|
---
## Valerie's Wild Run Comes to an End
Valerie, a miniature dachshund, survived 17 months alone in the Australian wilderness before finally making it home safe last April. [See the photo of Valerie here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkT2upDAQhE8DWY-MYQwTEGxC9jbdEHnsBvfKPyN3A3q3X_GusEElpdInfao_X-uXpUh5_20Tztu-rbKVNePFEUWwrqmwxHKi3xDjXopnKZWQy6qVNqA6UHr1luL3OrR-3hA19i3O3WjGfhrHYWjD_PK-x-fL9p13qF7vTqluGJ5qevtxmoxrab5pqlNa3-kfDt3Wj84_32iNH0wzKPQkpT7-FsoScIvf5cT6cCW1cQ4iH276X41eGr1c1_XgRBK4ZLI52f2eNXrhZKvAbdfoRQIxIO1B4FOO7CFRJitHRfDWBQ53x0c96UQPnYFUsgSGksFCPfYdPdiDpdpINgNxtNnD-xDggHCVLBBRoCK7AyuDs58feMAK3aRek-kH0-ilrbP_XBQjsRmbQe3JUvzxkv8-5Jz1vwAAAP__-mimnw). She vanished in November 2023 during a family camping trip on Kangaroo Island, slipping out of a playpen while her owners were fishing. For more than 500 days, the 8-pound pup braved predators, harsh weather, and thick bush, evading rescuers time and again. Once, a princess whose owners dressed her in pink dog outfits, Valerie survived by eating roadkill. Rescuers set up trail cameras and would occasionally catch glimpses of her, confirming she was still alive--footage that drew widespread attention and support on social media. Volunteers with Kangala Wildlife Rescue [finally brought her in](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkMHKpDAQhJ8m3hxiG41zyGEv3mave5Qe09FeohmS1sG3X9xX-A8FBQXFx_fnNb2QI-_Lb9zIhSVMEtK007dEEqE8balITCf5QBSXlHyRlJlKmkBDX-um1jB55HhNpvIuEAG1FbnG9rYdrDWmWl3_HHSHfhi6rkF8d0Ojny001r4Hg7ppK3b3m240wJ32MdMcWjv77k3Ye9Mro8mzpPz4m3iXlUK80kn5Maetim4V-RTV_lIwKhj365OK3JOCETR0CkZt7t4rGCMHKnJFUjDiUSRjZCx1wDNlFqrDsbDwSTXWHue1rMfu60xlPsgrGKvs_OfLMXLprTJ62ZDjfwz5sb_Twb8AAAD__9DEhjI) using a custom-built trap scented with her bed, toys, and her owner's worn T-shirt. [Now back home](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGupCAYhZ8GOwz-IIwFxTZ2d9stDVcOygZlAoxm3n4z-wq3OO3J931_vpYvF1M8t9_ugA1bWFrIy4m7JrSGshy5tpQv-ACkLWdfWy4RNS8kSHMxcEGLdzG9F9V5GwCC7GAHo418GKNUt1sQkUFQOhDkAxOmaRy0F1KZ6eHWqYv28yYGQfSZ7FesQZrVj99w2ivNlICPLZf-b45n2xHSO18o_ZqPLtm9tWdl8hejmdF833fvvtf-ROvdi9H88WE0k6CRi5ELw2i-XEKJ4N6te91fp-cFrzM2eJ7vE6VyFxoKH5Xg3r0rT7k2RvMgRtJSGdEV6593TClWbZgS2-Fi-s_TfhzysvQvAAD__4TKh-o) in New South Wales, Valerie has been declared healthy by a vet and is settling in with her family. Rescuers called her survival a once-in-a-lifetime feat of instinct and grit.
## Dad Rescues Daughter After Cruise Fall
A dramatic rescue unfolded on June 29, 2025, when a [5‐year‐old girl fell from](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDHO4yAUhE9jd0SACcQFxTbpsu2WCPMeNhH4WUAS5fYr_1f4i5FGmtGn0fx7uIdPOe3rX1_QxjW6Hsnt-GkZe8fqCrWe6Y0QEfNKBK1TTdjISS4144Jx6cCn_HVqBBsRJU4jWmG0mW7GKDVuVkc_T0oGD-I2z0HMeuE6TnEJRl5lEGOyJ40LLuWp6RIwxMkEuC7oNSg9KI6QOtXLk9LeN4z5S2-sl0BlzHbr_WjD9GeQ90HeD6Qj4xkN8g6p7fhlob5SQ3b41nBfsTLAFmpasLFCBffOwAN7vsrR2AleyFdgPvaz6l_rdhohjFb8qsdq4fiknFPTZlB8LT7lnyn91x--rfwfAAD__6_AirQ) the fourth deck of the Disney Dream cruise ship into the Atlantic Ocean, and her father immediately jumped in after her. An eyewitness said the girl was sitting on a railing when she slipped. Passengers reported hearing an “awful scream” and a huge splash before the crew sounded a “Mr. MOB ... port side” (man overboard) alert. [See photos here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOqzAQRb_GdI7MQDApXLyGLq_dEhnPGLwyNrInifj7FfsLW8w0R7o6934956cNMaT1v93J-NXP7POc6FMjMVOZ91w55jehJ4przlg5l0A1z6BgkKqVCma0IZ5z36DxREBdQ6bVg-5Grfu-2cyATvulA4269fiwjh4jDKOGO2k9-kcTzJWmWgVwXXdz5HynHd4XsgP2g-gVYeBcbt85JN7IxzO_qdxc3ptoNuajiu6fgEnAlM4jV76QgAkU3AVMSl-vFTC9qrz6CZgw1ESndOUVKsnD1kpppSKRqithoSqZSgn-DGmVe94psbTSW96oSJtQon2tG1ORnwtdPku2BQVMTTF4fEKMoQ5a9GrdbYi_svznld8GfgIAAP__cv-VqA). According to onlookers, the father and daughter tread water for roughly 20 minutes before Disney Cruise Line crew members pulled them into a rescue boat, as passengers applauded their safe return. Both were unharmed, and Disney praised its crew for their rapid and effective response. [Watch a video of the rescue here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGKhDAURb8mdiPPZ0ycIsU2drPtliEmL06G6BtMUObvF_cXtrhw4cKBe34e9uFSTtvy7VYycYm2RrYbnSVTrbTblUvNfFCIRHlhDqXynqiwRUB1g-4GaINL-WNlE0wkQuobMp1Wuh-1lrJ5Gj0OwaPyCrpOz34E5-a5k268x6G_D9Akc9GgA8QrfevJx177MMzkVJBKSKCQKu_ti9NWnxTzhw_aW89rk82z1ncR_ZfASeB0nmc7z_7aBE7XGYHTkQLxVfyeAfQgX0pxs5vwPlPOqSgtJCyrS_mPWf8t4zD4GwAA___JLHSx).
## 80-Year-Old Woman Breaks Ironman Record
Natalie Grabow of New Jersey made history in October 2025 when she became [the oldest woman to finish](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOnDAQhJ_GdEb2wsGlcJGG7tKmRIu9hk2MFxnn0L19RJQ3-Istdj5pNDM_X_MLOXFef-BOLq5xrlHmTNeZqFYq8y5nTfKmEInSKhLOKoXplBkMDNpYbWAOyOkz901wkQioa8jZcRi75zj2fbO5aL319DSxeywPazHgjQ0t4dl9AwsNu9vNWANwX9d68rEbfXgshEPoB9UbClyltL-Ec90opo-8qbRe9ia5rdbjVN13BZOC6bquthaGfryxgqkWxrolyfpupmDClfRa5M-hYMpYMfH94yKXvqSkoAt5KUFzkbxj_i_6DfeDJZ8bH_q3ZGyKC8fFKfE5jKo3646c_kWqX97y7eBvAAAA___mYY4f) the Ironman World Championship in Kona, Hawaii, at 80 years of age. Natalie completed [the 140.6-mile course](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD1uhDAUhE9jOpD_AmzhIg3dpk2JjP0MLzJ-yLbW2ttH5AoppplPGs3M93N9WoyY9i97ggl7WGugNUErEWqFvJ5UaqQX-AAQdyJfKmWEQqvkcuy56LlcvcX4XnXnTQCQoDowYhonNU-T1t1h1MN5vj1mMepZCDdvwjortN-m8FCgbIfmTuOCS3lLDQ5cUJPzHxvY0euRaQ4eK-XhhzDVA0J80wvy4OjsojlqvQpTn0wuTC6ttSFt7l5xcyaXclGuhcmlZrT1iJSYXDBTanTa1CdbbUTo92w3av0NbrtRjr53hz0vpFQOvPrskpVayVl02firYYxYxolpvp8W41-d-u8fX0b-BgAA__8wxozM) in 16 hours, 45 minutes, and 26 seconds, winning the women’s 80–84 division in her tenth appearance at the event. She qualified by winning her age group at Ironman Maryland earlier in the year and trained rigorously, logging up to 11 workouts per week. A longtime runner who took up triathlons in her 60s, Natalie says she races not to prove anything, but simply because she loves it. And she’s not slowing down—more races are already on her 2026 calendar. [Watch a video of Natalie](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0MFOxCAYBOCnobdtKLBQDxxMzB5M1qiJeiQs_LQYuv_a_lvStzf1FTzMZSb5DvN1dmefS74OL34Cm4bkKKG7Ql0KEMHsJlyo4AoxAZQBMS6Ec4YFneBCH3h34MJFn8vmVBNtAhAgG7Cd0Ub2xijVjFb24uhNiP1DCJ3svTl2Ol5UCjGopKNvst013nEh9sg2QEjShHi8gNdRaaY4xEw4t9-YrzRCKhuuMLcBp6bYkei2MPnIxImJU6213fBO9wvs-954CiOTp5XJp9q_i8_X7e3n-aOZbbzVXEpetGGKD5PP5Y-kf3-xWvEbAAD__1VpddY).
## Twins Go Viral for In-Sync Interview
Identical twins Bridgette and Paula Powers [went viral this spring](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHO4yAQhJ8Gd0R4ISYpKK5xl2uvtDhYnD1hNgLOlt_-l_9X-IuRRhppNPP9eS0vT5nK-ttv6NKalp54KXi0jL1jXTZuPfOOMSHmlTm2zpWw8QIKJqlGqWCJnvK5mCG6hAioB3Sjnax-WGvM8HY46sl49fTT_WEjJKV9QNAB_NPo0duB3NWmRgVwSd8ChqRtiPe_6KdoJmEURupcb_-YSn9jyifvWG-BtyG7d--fJvQvAbOAuZwfbv2KBMyg4C5gVubyIGA-uOYor4sCZv-_9eoz-SIpYukUfJb9oNLkynKn6rNMXCXHKKnIdpYgqXSsO-EhYB6qi5-DcqY2WWHUunnK36P6j2nuDr4CAAD__wUyi9g) after giving a TV interview in perfect unison about their mother’s harrowing encounter with an armed carjacker in Queensland, Australia. In a mesmerizing display of synchronicity, the 50-year-old sisters mirrored each other’s speech and gestures as they described how their mother remained calm. [Watch the interview here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFy6yAQheGnQZ09y4LALijuLdTZbUoGwSKTQcIjNnb89hnnFVKc5hRf8X9c_CWUWrblGlZyecmec_MbPXslZtr92jrX9qCUierSWurc9kK9eQQ0B5AHQJ9CqS-vh-QyEZIayElrrDpZq_VwcyDH-TRbNZqgok4nIBVBqyQVqGgIhuLeGkhAfE8dI8WsbEzjTMEkbYQGSoXbfvxsZeMb5fpqD9qPsa1DdTfmexfqn8BJ4PT9fgVO9krP_n8vfQ4bCZw6B_7qAid5lholjtKOYM76LJUddpfuz1Jr6cYKDcsaSv3V-c9ZHg5_AgAA__9EmHXb). The twins, founders of a pelican rescue nonprofit, credit their lifelong bond for their near-telepathic delivery, which has made them repeat viral sensations.
## Texas Mailman Adopts Dog from Old Route
When Texas mail carrier Ian Burke learned that Floyd—a 70-pound dog from his old route—had been surrendered after his owner died, he arrived before the shelter opened to be [first in line to adopt him](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykUL2O8yAQfBrcYeE1MXFB8TXu8rVXIgKLzQlnI9hzlLc_-e4RrphpRpq_j5u7-VzyY_3vd7RpTY4TuQe-WkFmrG6nxoUOjAmxrESxMdWMjRwomKQapAIXfS5vp7toEyLg2KEdzGTGqzFad5s1oOHuJzRzmJWOQemIYUyzVoDzxcxdtqebGhTAibEPGNJoQrzc0U9RT0IrjJmp9p-UH7xhKm86sPaB9q7YjfnZxPhPwCJgOev3X-3ZTlXAAgouAhZ1PWkQsPCWm4y0ysZUUHr5O1YGX2vG2uSGvrKApas2Pl-5lNwmI7Rad5_LTyb_-azDwncAAAD__5Btf0c). Ian had delivered mail to the pair for over a year and remembered Floyd charging at him like an eager puppy the first time they met. After his route changed, [Ian learned](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGO4yAYBOCnsTsiDNgkBcU16XLtlYj4HxxO2L8FJNm8_cr7CltMNdI30vy7-VtIOW3L37DCxSX6FtlveNeM1lD8yrVlfoEikBdmqo1LQmWvpJqEHIRUnkLKH296chFQ0D3cYCerz9Ya0z8cKcwG5mKtlRc7zfdoNKwatb5bc9aqT-7Q5CCVOqJPM-ao7UzjHWEiM3VGglLjcvrPaWsPxPzhF8pp5rXP7tHaXjv9p1PXTl138J5xVJ26NnyFKtaQ8ho2EYj3VkV9loKNUECCeBGx8Co4kyj8bBDDYEd5lmNfHO3vlHOqk-2MXA7mZ7L9-quXU98BAAD__yS6gL8) from the carrier who took over his old route that Floyd’s owner—a Vietnam veteran—had passed away, and the dog was now at the City of Denton Animal Shelter. _“I don’t take it lightly—this isn’t some random dog I’m adopting,”_ he said, later calling the experience “probably one of the best things the postal service inadvertently issued me.”
| _Flying together with our sponsor_ [](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOqzAQRb_GdEFm7NiPwkWkiC6v3RIZPIZZDQwCiyR_v8r-wha3uzpHOl-P_hGJaZ3-xwVDnnJfsvQrPg_GUnDvFzkKy4kpI_Ikko4iO-EhPWhwF91cNPQpEr97W6WQEQFNhaHxzpt_3ltbzcF562IztN604JrRRd22g2m1RjDg0FYUPjTdaIDPTD3imI0f03XA6JJ1ympMVGSvv4XWMmPmt5y416MsFYe5lO1Q5qagU9Btu6yReJRlY3x9Lgq6kxJKvc2bMl3MmZhiQWXug3CKG74aBa5QUuaeOeMkCZOGO45wvVV7SNuTmOlwXlk9LZH411z-nOwM8BMAAP__55iCMw) What if there was a natural way to get rid of nail fungus... Much stronger and way more efficient than any OTC treatment? It sounds too good to be true, right? clean_body: As you revel in the onset of a fresh new year, please enjoy this special edition of The Feel Good Flyover as we look back at the most loved stories of 2025. | | | | | | Friday, January 2, 2026 ---|--- Good Afternoon! As you revel in the onset of a fresh new year, please enjoy this special edition of The Feel Good Flyover as we look back at the most loved stories of 2025. And don't forget to tune in to the , where host Amy Hess explores what made these moments resonate--and why they still matter. Today's sponsor, , is sharing a surprisingly simple, natural approach that claims to help eliminate stubborn nail fungus and restore healthy-looking nails without harsh over-the-counter treatments. | Valerie's Wild Run Comes to an End Valerie, a miniature dachshund, survived 17 months alone in the Australian wilderness before finally making it home safe last April. . She vanished in November 2023 during a family camping trip on Kangaroo Island, slipping out of a playpen while her owners were fishing. For more than 500 days, the 8-pound pup braved predators, harsh weather, and thick bush, evading rescuers time and again. Once, a princess whose owners dressed her in pink dog outfits, Valerie survived by eating roadkill. Rescuers set up trail cameras and would occasionally catch glimpses of her, confirming she was still alive--footage that drew widespread attention and support on social media. Volunteers with Kangala Wildlife Rescue using a custom-built trap scented with her bed, toys, and her owner's worn T-shirt. in New South Wales, Valerie has been declared healthy by a vet and is settling in with her family. Rescuers called her survival a once-in-a-lifetime feat of instinct and grit. Dad Rescues Daughter After Cruise Fall A dramatic rescue unfolded on June 29, 2025, when a the fourth deck of the Disney Dream cruise ship into the Atlantic Ocean, and her father immediately jumped in after her. An eyewitness said the girl was sitting on a railing when she slipped. Passengers reported hearing an “awful scream” and a huge splash before the crew sounded a “Mr. MOB ... port side” (man overboard) alert. . According to onlookers, the father and daughter tread water for roughly 20 minutes before Disney Cruise Line crew members pulled them into a rescue boat, as passengers applauded their safe return. Both were unharmed, and Disney praised its crew for their rapid and effective response. . 80-Year-Old Woman Breaks Ironman Record Natalie Grabow of New Jersey made history in October 2025 when she became the Ironman World Championship in Kona, Hawaii, at 80 years of age. Natalie completed in 16 hours, 45 minutes, and 26 seconds, winning the women’s 80–84 division in her tenth appearance at the event. She qualified by winning her age group at Ironman Maryland earlier in the year and trained rigorously, logging up to 11 workouts per week. A longtime runner who took up triathlons in her 60s, Natalie says she races not to prove anything, but simply because she loves it. And she’s not slowing down—more races are already on her 2026 calendar. . Twins Go Viral for In-Sync Interview Identical twins Bridgette and Paula Powers after giving a TV interview in perfect unison about their mother’s harrowing encounter with an armed carjacker in Queensland, Australia. In a mesmerizing display of synchronicity, the 50-year-old sisters mirrored each other’s speech and gestures as they described how their mother remained calm. . The twins, founders of a pelican rescue nonprofit, credit their lifelong bond for their near-telepathic delivery, which has made them repeat viral sensations. Texas Mailman Adopts Dog from Old Route When Texas mail carrier Ian Burke learned that Floyd—a 70-pound dog from his old route—had been surrendered after his owner died, he arrived before the shelter opened to be . Ian had delivered mail to the pair for over a year and remembered Floyd charging at him like an eager puppy the first time they met. After his route changed, from the carrier who took over his old route that Floyd’s owner—a Vietnam veteran—had passed away, and the dog was now at the City of Denton Animal Shelter. “I don’t take it lightly—this isn’t some random dog I’m adopting,” he said, later calling the experience “probably one of the best things the postal service inadvertently issued me.” | Flying together with our sponsor What if there was a natural way to get rid of nail fungus... Much stronger and way more efficient than any OTC treatment? It sounds too good to be true, right? name: Jeff Merkley
subject: As we step into a new year

body:
I hope you had a chance to rest, reflect, and spend time with the people who matter most to you.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122549795/592824673/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyY2JkYTEyMy0yMGU4LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h3X8U5kWD_W3LH1AkoYiO-UjFLha0EJvJ-8Y8uRo-4w=&emci=68ece028-11e8-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=2cbda123-20e8-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=7731215)
---

| | Happy New Year! I hope you had a chance to rest, reflect, and spend time with the people who matter most to you. **As we step into a new year, I'm feeling hopeful — not because the road ahead will be easy, but because I know what's possible when people stay engaged, organized, and committed.** Progress has never come from standing still. It comes from showing up, again and again, with clarity and courage. 2026 will be a pivotal moment to defend our democracy, protect fundamental freedoms, and ensure our government works for everyday people — not just the powerful. That work starts now, with conversations, community, and a shared belief that we can build a better country. I'm grateful to be in this fight with you. Your engagement, your voice, and your values make a real difference. Let's carry that spirit into 2026 — not angry, alone, and dejected, but together, energized, and organized. Here's to a year of purpose, progress, and people-powered change. clean_body: I hope you had a chance to rest, reflect, and spend time with the people who matter most to you. | | | | Happy New Year! I hope you had a chance to rest, reflect, and spend time with the people who matter most to you. As we step into a new year, I'm feeling hopeful — not because the road ahead will be easy, but because I know what's possible when people stay engaged, organized, and committed. Progress has never come from standing still. It comes from showing up, again and again, with clarity and courage. 2026 will be a pivotal moment to defend our democracy, protect fundamental freedoms, and ensure our government works for everyday people — not just the powerful. That work starts now, with conversations, community, and a shared belief that we can build a better country. I'm grateful to be in this fight with you. Your engagement, your voice, and your values make a real difference. Let's carry that spirit into 2026 — not angry, alone, and dejected, but together, energized, and organized. Here's to a year of purpose, progress, and people-powered change. Onward! name: Sign Your Name | Left Action
subject: Don't Let This Idiot Drag us into War with Iran
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Don't Let Trump Drag Us into War with Iran](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9f43fc65-5375-4cc4-af8a-ce7eb0843f24/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | _(Quick links: [Go to action](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7b52067c-ce59-4bdf-95ba-a91df98c395f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) | [Discuss on Substack](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9bb1a405-dd96-4229-baf6-a8b6554e03cd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) | [See other actions)](https://default.salsalabs.org/T267a9538-da63-4994-ab0f-c2bfa033d414/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[ ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf657bc2c-901d-4797-9fc8-fe397514d17e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_ **Donald Trump is once again making reckless threats online, and this time he's putting the United States on a dangerous path toward war with Iran. ** In the middle of the night, when he's even less rational than usual, Trump declared that if Iran responds violently to ongoing protests, "America will come to their rescue" and that the U.S. is "locked and loaded." These kinds of impulsive, unhinged statements are not foreign policy. They're a recipe for disaster. [**And if he won't stop it, Congress can and must use its war powers granted by the Constitution to stop him. **](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5ab63c81-7bcf-431d-a855-978488235dcb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [****](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6e038913-2181-490b-846a-d60f5e74d89a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Threatening military action on social media risks escalating tensions, undermining legitimate protest movements, and sleepwalking the country into a devastating conflict with a country _that may already have nuclear capabilities. _ **Trump's posturing doesn't help the people of Iran. It helps their government reframe protests as "Iran versus America," which can sap support from demonstrators and be misused to justify harsher crackdowns. Even worse, vague promises of U.S. intervention could give protesters false information and expectations that put lives at risk.** The United States has powerful military forces in the region, but they are not toys for impulsive, performative threats. Any confrontation with Iran carries enormous risks and must be approached with extreme caution. Trump must stop making reckless threats that are fraught with danger. And Congress must use every power it has from the Constitution and the War Powers Act to prevent him from dragging the country into another unnecessary war. [**Add your name: "We demand that Trump stop trying to drag us into war with Iran, and that Congress finally use its power to stop him."**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5bfad3c8-9901-4b07-a91d-64fddee4e247/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: David Hogg
subject: Crisis
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
We have to ask ourselves this question...
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20260102-1&t=1&akid=3006%2E587540%2Eu0h3up)
Hey Peter, it’s David Hogg.
We have to ask ourselves: How do we build a Democratic Party that the working class wants to vote for?
Because right now, we’re facing a _real_ problem.
Millions of people are leaving blue states and moving to the South, where their votes are gerrymandered and suppressed out of power.
We say we want to win back the working class. We say we want dramatic change.
But then we turn around and expect to do all that _without changing who’s in power._
That’s not going to work.
**The cast of characters that brought us here are not who’s going to get us out of here.**
If we’re serious about saving our democracy, if we’re serious about becoming the party of the people, not just the lesser evil — then we need to start acting like it.
That’s why Leaders We Deserve is building a healthy, people-powered culture of primaries.
**We believe that being in office for 30 years shouldn’t mean you get to coast through the next 10 without a challenge, especially not in the middle of a crisis.**
We are a democracy. We are the Democratic Party. We need to have a healthy culture of ensuring that people, including incumbents, can be challenged in primaries — and it’s not looked down on. It is embraced and celebrated.
We’re not doing this to be divisive. We’re doing this because our party has to dramatically change if it wants to survive and win elections again.
We need to tangibly show voters why we are not the least bad of two options, but why we are the best option. Period.
And that’s not going to happen with the same insiders spouting the same empty talking points year after year.
We need a new generation of leaders — with new ideas, new energy, and the courage to tell voters the truth and actually earn their trust. And yeah, that might make some folks in power uncomfortable.
But guess what? _That’s the point._
**Comfortable people — especially comfortable people with power — do not change. And right now, it is time for a change in management.**
This is a moment of crisis. We cannot keep tiptoeing around the truth.
Our democracy is being dismantled in broad daylight. And if we don’t meet this moment with urgency, courage, and new leadership — we will lose.
We have to change this culture and truly embrace democracy within our party if we are going to find our way out of this. Because no single person has the answer — but I can assure you, a healthy culture of competition is something our party can only stand to benefit from.
**At Leaders We Deserve, we’re not afraid to shake things up. We’re building the bench.**
**We’re challenging the status quo. And we’re backing the kind of young, bold, progressive candidates who have the guts to do what this moment demands.**
But we need your support to do this work. We can only keep changing the game with folks like you stepping up to power our grassroots movement.
**[Peter, contribute $5 or anything you can right now to back us in this fight.](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20260102_crisis._rvcGx&refcode=em20260102-3006&amount=5&t=2&akid=3006%2E587540%2Eu0h3up)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20260102_crisis._rvcGx&amount=5&refcode=em20260102-3006&t=21&akid=3006%2E587540%2Eu0h3up)**
With urgency and gratitude,
David Hogg
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20260102-1&t=22&refcode2=3006_587540_u0h3up&akid=3006%2E587540%2Eu0h3up)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=23&akid=3006%2E587540%2Eu0h3up)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=3006%2E587540%2Eu0h3up)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)
PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

name: JB Pritzker
subject: Let’s make this the GOP’s WORST bet!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Let me cut to the chase.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122549978/592825498/1047731393?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.01.02_Chris-Pappas-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzM2YjIzYi0yMmU4LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BmYEYS1A8pFpaOxI_hunLSk1vdXN-ZbSuoq7ISuDko8=) JB Pritzker here.

**Let me cut to the chase: New Hampshire’s Senate race could decide whether Democrats take back the majority — _and Republicans know it_.**

Donald Trump and the MAGA GOP see this seat as one of their best shots to expand their power.

They’ve already got a Republican governor in New Hampshire, and they’re betting they can flip the Senate seat next. If they win here, our chances of taking back the Senate drop to zero.

_We can’t let that happen._

Chris is a proven fighter for working families — taking on Big Pharma, defending reproductive freedom, and making sure our government actually works for the people it serves.

I’ve seen what happens when leaders like Chris have the platform and the power to make change — and _I want him in the Senate_.

I know Chris can win, but there’s no way around it: **_This isn’t a safe blue seat, folks._**

The GOP is ready to flood New Hampshire with attack ads and dark money. The only way to beat them is with early, grassroots support. That’s where you come in:

clean_body: Let me cut to the chase. = JB Pritzker here. Let me cut to the chase: New Hampshire’s Senate race could decide whether Democrats take back the majority — and Republicans know it. Donald Trump and the MAGA GOP see this seat as one of their best shots to expand their power. They’ve already got a Republican governor in New Hampshire, and they’re betting they can flip the Senate seat next. If they win here, our chances of taking back the Senate drop to zero. We can’t let that happen. Chris is a proven fighter for working families — taking on Big Pharma, defending reproductive freedom, and making sure our government actually works for the people it serves. I’ve seen what happens when leaders like Chris have the platform and the power to make change — and I want him in the Senate. I know Chris can win, but there’s no way around it: This isn’t a safe blue seat, folks. The GOP is ready to flood New Hampshire with attack ads and dark money. The only way to beat them is with early, grassroots support. name: Ro Khanna
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]
Peter,
Thank you for your activism and support in 2025.
Because of supporters like you, we closed the year strong and sent a clear message: this movement is powered by people, not big money.
Your contribution helps make the work real.
It’s why we’ve been able to host 22 town halls in red and swing districts to meet more than 9,000 voters where they are – in union halls, community centers, churches, and school gyms.
Every one of those conversations matters.
* They matter because Republicans voted to slash nearly $1 trillion from Medicaid and food assistance.
* They matter because too many members of Congress won’t even show up to answer for it.
* And they matter because this is how we flip the House in 2026 —by organizing, showing up, and building real trust with voters.
Your support keeps us on the road, keeps these town halls going, and keeps our campaign independent.
I don’t take PAC money. I don’t take corporate money. I don’t take lobbyist money. This campaign runs on people like you. Thank you for standing with me.
Onward,
Ro
Wait! One more thing–
Ro doesn't accept a cent from lobbyists or PACs, meaning our work is completely funded by grassroots supporters like you. By donating just $3 today, you’re helping us create a country that works for everyone, not just those at the top. That means a renewed investment in American manufacturing, Medicare for All, student debt relief, and a green future.
If you want to support our people-powered campaign as we continue to fight for progress in Washington, please consider making a donation of $3 or more today. Thank you!

| | **WES' STORY**
_Wes Climer is a husband, father of five, business owner and public servant who believes in doing the hard work, telling the truth and never backing down from a fight. Raised in South Carolina and now representing York County in the State Senate, Wes has built a reputation for being one of the most effective and conservative voices in Columbia. He’s not in politics to climb the ladder or play the game. He’s in it to fix what’s broken.

Wes isn’t just a principled conservative. He’s a proven leader. Whether it’s stopping legislative pay raises, delivering road funding for York County or pushing for real school choice, Wes has shown he’s willing to take on anyone, Republicans or Democrats, to do what’s right.

name: Kirsten (via Off the Sidelines)
subject: There’s something you should know.

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_ots_header [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_ots_header]
Allow me explain where this all began.

For too long, I saw brilliant young leaders hesitate to run for office. I watched qualified, passionate women sit on the sidelines while men dominated our political landscape. I witnessed crucial voices go unheard in the rooms where decisions were made.

That's why I started Off the Sidelines.

I founded this organization because I believe our democracy is stronger when diverse voices have a seat at the table — and I'm not talking about just any seat. I'm talking about leadership positions.

Since launching Off the Sidelines, we've helped elect Democrats up and down the ballot. But right now, our progress is under threat.

With Republicans controlling the House and Senate, our hard-won gains on everything from health care to workers' rights are on the line.

That's why I'm personally asking you to rush your very first $ donation of the year to Off the Sidelines. We need to raise as much as possible to beat the GOP this November if we’re going to keep recruiting amazing Democrats, provide them with the resources they need to win and take back our majority.

Can I count on you to chip in right away? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_em_q12026_ots?amount=]

name: Team Katie Porter
subject: We can’t let a Republican become California’s next governor.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40652%2E3422442%2EmwJdAJ)
Peter,
We’re now exactly five months away from Katie’s primary election day.
Here’s why that’s so important:
California has a ‘jungle primary’ system, meaning unlike most primaries that advance one Democrat and one Republican, the top two vote-getters move on to the general, regardless of party.
We have to make sure Katie lands in the top two and two Republicans don’t advance to the general election.
**If we fall short in the primary, voters won’t even have the chance to choose Katie in November.** To break through, we need to scale up our organizing, get on TV, and reach voters from Eureka to San Diego.
**[Peter, we need your support today to help Katie win on June 2nd. Please donate $5 right now.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260102_1_ak.mFuUqk&refcode=em20260102-40652&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=40652%2E3422442%2EmwJdAJ)**
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260102_1_ak.mFuUqk&refcode=em20260102-40652&t=22&akid=40652%2E3422442%2EmwJdAJ)
The stakes are high. We can’t let a Republican become California’s next governor.
Thank you,
Team Porter

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20260102-40652&amounts=&t=23&refcode2=40652_3422442_mwJdAJ&akid=40652%2E3422442%2EmwJdAJ)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4g-emails?source=40652&t=24&akid=40652%2E3422442%2EmwJdAJ)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4g-em-update-info-footer?source=40652)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4g-unsubscribe?source=40652&t=25&akid=40652%2E3422442%2EmwJdAJ)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)

name: Tina Kotek
subject: Deep appreciation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
Tina for Oregon [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92654/images/TinaForOregon-Logo-FullColor-white.png]
Dear Friends,

Thank you for all your support last year – and for all your support since we started this journey together.

2025 will certainly stand out as the most challenging of my first term. Together, we beat back President Trump's attempt to deploy the Oregon National Guard in Portland, we stood up for our neighbors who are hungry, and we fought to protect our immigrant and refugee communities. Despite the headwinds from D.C., we also continued to make progress to improve the lives of Oregonians.

I'm hopeful for what we will accomplish together in 2026. I've never been more proud to be your Governor. And I’m so glad to have you by my side.

Happy New Year!

With gratitude and best wishes,

Tina

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-em-q1-2026]

Portland, OR 97242

name: Christina Hines
subject: Thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christina for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cbh_email-26q1?refcode=x_260102_EOYTY_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cbh_email-26q1?refcode=x_260102_EOYTY_act]
Dear friend,
I want to start the New Year by thanking you for all your support, hard work, and encouragement throughout 2025 and for believing in our team as we start 2026!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cbh_email-26q1?refcode=x_260102_EOYTY_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cbh_email-26q1?refcode=x_260102_EOYTY_act]
Last year, our family grew far beyond our front door. We met new friends, neighbors became partners, and we received endorsements, contributions, and signatures from every corner of our district. We built relationships with national stakeholders like EMILYs List and Giffords, and we received contributions from over six thousand individual donors across the country.
Your courage, hope, and resilience remind me why our voices and this work matter. We all want and deserve safe neighborhoods, great schools, accessible healthcare, and a future where every single one of us can thrive. Together, we will make 2026 a year of real change for working families across the country.
Thank you for everything—from contributions and volunteer hours to your honesty, encouragement, kind words, and feedback. It truly means the world to me!
With love and gratitude,
Christina
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cbh_email-26q1?refcode=x_260102_EOYTY_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cbh_email-26q1?refcode=x_260102_EOYTY_act] Christina is a lifelong advocate for justice and a former prosecutor for survivors of sexual assault, child abuse, and human trafficking.
Now she’s running to bring that same dedication to Congress, working to put the middle class first, protect the American Dream, and ensure every community can thrive. She fights for safe neighborhoods, fair opportunities, and a future where everyone can succeed.
To learn more about Christina, visit ChristinaHinesForCongress.com [christinahinesforcongress.com] .

name: Roy Cooper
subject: about Laura Loomer’s tweet:
body:
I will not back down from this fight.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2365?source=&t=1&akid=288%2E124072%2E_4EyjF)
_I’m on the MAGA right’s radar again, Peter._ Laura Loomer just posted an attack against me and our campaign on her social media. She is trying to intimidate us, but she won’t succeed. I won’t be silenced by a conspiracy theory monger whose only goal is to enable the worst impulses of the far-right. **[I will always stand up for our democracy, for human rights, and for the future of this country. If you’re ready to stand with me, please join our fight with a contribution today.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3721?t=7&akid=288%2E124072%2E_4EyjF)** Peter, Laura Loomer’s smear campaign isn’t the first time I’ve faced the onslaught of the MAGA right. National Republicans know that this race will determine who controls the U.S. Senate, so they’re throwing everything they have at us. This is just another attempt to activate the far-right’s network of online trolls and grifters against us — _and it’s doing nothing but firing me up even more._ **They’re trying to divide us, but I will never back down. I will never give up.** **[I hope you’ll chip in right now to help keep up this fight, flip this seat from red to blue, and stop the MAGA GOP.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3721?t=8&akid=288%2E124072%2E_4EyjF)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $5](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3722?t=9&akid=288%2E124072%2E_4EyjF)
---

---
[DONATE $25](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3724?t=11&akid=288%2E124072%2E_4EyjF)
---

---
[DONATE $100](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3726?t=13&akid=288%2E124072%2E_4EyjF)
---
[DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3727?t=14&akid=288%2E124072%2E_4EyjF)
---
Gratefully,
Roy Cooper
[](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3721?t=15&akid=288%2E124072%2E_4EyjF)
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=2&akid=288%2E124072%2E_4EyjF)**

name: Kathryn Harvey
subject: 👟I walked 1642.5 miles in 2025
body:
Join me Monday for our first meeting of the year.

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/506e459c7af6/kathryn-harvey-for-congresscampaign-kickoff-6423554?e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
|
---
| |
# I walked 1642.5 miles in 2025
---
| |
And all of you walked with me. I have asked more of my community in the past year than I could have ever imagined. You showed up to knock thousands of doors, connected with voters, engaged civically in South Carolina, attended Candid Conversations, and supported a record number of candidates running in 2025.
---
[|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=23e3f66d1b&e=edbde6c9b1)
| |

You advocated for yourself and others, you took action from the school board to the state house, you protested your Congresspeople and Senators and you kept the heat on this administration. I hope you are as proud of what we are building together as I am, because we are just getting started.
I ended this year just like I began it, spending time with my niece. We had a 75 and sunny day at the beach, a far cry from our January snowmageddon in Charleston.
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| |
---
| |
I reflected on what forward movement looks like in the Upstate of South Carolina. It can sometimes feel like two steps forward and one step back, but remember that is still the right direction. And we made so much progress in so many ways in 2025.
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |

[Yesterday I read an article that our top headlines were: ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=7c7515c591&e=edbde6c9b1)-Corrupt Spartanburg Sheriff Chuck Wright falls from grace-Spartanburg County at Epicenter for Measles Outbreak-Spartanburg brought baseball back to the Burg -Johnson Development Project Core revitalizes downtown-Limestone University Shutters, mired in debt
The majority of the headlines above are a result of lack of transparency, government corruption, and poor policy decisions. We deserve better.
Notable elected officials vacated seats this year: Bill Rhyne was elected to Sheriff, Paul Abbott was elected to County Council replacing David Britt, Leslie Rodgers was elected to City Council replacing Rob Rain, and the voters sent [Former Senator Lee Bright back to the state house replacing Roger Nutt and expanding the Freedom Caucus](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=e752867ca1&e=edbde6c9b1) despite our best efforts at a formidable write-in campaign with Steve Evered.
Spartanburg CPW had two seats open after Horace Littlejohn Jr. opted not to seek another term and Angela Viney resigned because she was moving. Voters picked Dr. Octavia Amaechi to replace Littlejohn and in a contentious move, the board selected Dillon Swayngim to fill Viney’s seat. [Swayngim, who lost the election to Amaechi was was sworn in earlier last month, while Amaechi will be sworn in January 27.](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=7042d59a7f&e=edbde6c9b1)
[I](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=7268cca7b1&e=edbde6c9b1)t is incumbent upon the citizens of this community to demand accountability at all levels. Join me Monday night, January 5 from 6-7:30pm at the TK Gregg Community Center in Spartanburg. We’ll be discussing the data centers coming to Spartanburg, what happened with the CPW, 2026 races, and more.
---
[|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=6c92096678&e=edbde6c9b1)
| [RSVP Here](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=48b0b719b4&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| |
* **January 1-15 Rights & Empowerment Art Show Benefiting WREN Blue Spirit Studio **
* [**January 5th SPCDP Monthly Meeting Dr. TK Gregg Community Center**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=638b9f0406&e=edbde6c9b1)
* [**January 7th Greenville Anti-DEI Bill Panel 12pm Hughes Main Library**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=c704114fcd&e=edbde6c9b1)
* [**January 13 2026 Legislative Session - see pre-filed bills**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=15aa9ffa1d&e=edbde6c9b1)
* [**January 17th MLK Event with Reverend Barber @ Wofford**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=0c4b7dbd83&e=edbde6c9b1)
* [**January 19 MLK Day of Service**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=0f264df7a7&e=edbde6c9b1)
* [**January 24 So you want to run for office? 10am -12pm 505 East Main St**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=c2794c0dd9&e=edbde6c9b1)
* January 27 Commissioner of Public Works Dr. Amaechi Swearing In Ceremony

| | [**McMaster halts race-based spending quotas for SC Agencies**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=90c373fa87&e=edbde6c9b1)
[ Liquor Liability Compromise, Senate takes on Energy](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=4f5d407196&e=edbde6c9b1)[SC Special elections send three conservative lawmakers to Columbia](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=09facea429&e=edbde6c9b1)[What to know about 2026 races in South Carolina](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=4f528e74d9&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
| |

# **What to know about Trump administration freezing federal child care funds**
---
| |

The Trump administration has said it is freezing child care funds to all states until they provide more verification and administrative data about the programs in a move fueled by a series of fraud schemes at Minnesota day care centers [**run by Somali residents.**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=9e13e335ca&e=edbde6c9b1) All 50 states will be impacted by the review, but the Republican administration is focusing most of its ire on the blue state of Minnesota. Minnesota Democratic Attorney General Keith Ellison said in a statement Wednesday that he was "exploring all our legal options to ensure that critical childcare services do not get abruptly slashed based on pretext and grandstanding."
[Read More](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=e6b0676467&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| [|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=8ef04315ee&e=edbde6c9b1)
| |
I really meant it when I said I took a week off! I celebrated Christmas with my parents, took my niece to the beach, we shopped till we dropped and went to see the Blue Dogs play at the Charleston Music Hall.
Democracy is a participatory sport, but it also requires rest. Stay with me y’all, we’ve got a helluvah year ahead.
---

Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important facts - a kernel of truth - from the week. _[If you were forwarded this newsletter, you can sign up to receive the Kernel every week by clicking here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122551020/592829278/1416943042?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MWMyOThlOC0yY2U4LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5IwCj8dbVVkqzuxnxYAGS8zBrvHp_gRet_BUh_okBMk=&emci=ed0f6997-27e8-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=71c298e8-2ce8-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=4925535)_ [_**If you'd like to donate to the INDems' Reorganization Fund, you can do so by clicking here.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122551021/592829279/1764064610?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MWMyOThlOC0yY2U4LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5IwCj8dbVVkqzuxnxYAGS8zBrvHp_gRet_BUh_okBMk=) ****
_Happy New Year from Indiana Dems!_ [__](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122551022/592829280/481876647?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MWMyOThlOC0yY2U4LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5IwCj8dbVVkqzuxnxYAGS8zBrvHp_gRet_BUh_okBMk=&emci=ed0f6997-27e8-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=71c298e8-2ce8-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=4925535) Happy New Year from the Indiana Democratic Party! 2025 was a year of ups and downs. We saw terrible policies come out of the Republican majority in Congress and the Braun supermajority at the Indiana Statehouse. However, it came with many wins as well. Together, we elected new leadership to our state and local parties, and stopped the redistricting scheme from redrawing our congressional maps. Hoosiers, you stood up and showed the world what we are made of. Let's take that same energy into 2026 to change the leadership of our state. ****_Governor Braun Denies Summer Meals for Hundreds of Thousands of Hoosier Children Paid for by Feds_
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122551023/592829281/785356390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MWMyOThlOC0yY2U4LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5IwCj8dbVVkqzuxnxYAGS8zBrvHp_gRet_BUh_okBMk=&emci=ed0f6997-27e8-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=71c298e8-2ce8-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=4925535) Governor Mike Braun’s administration has become defined by its cruel cuts to vulnerable Hoosiers. This week, the Governor’s administration added to it by announcing it will not participate in the federal summer meals program for 2026. This is cruel blow to over 500,000 Hoosiers who would’ve qualified for the program. They cited costs as the reason, but the $6 million price tag on administrative costs is an amount the state spends every hour. There is ample room in the budget for this program, and it’s time for the Governor to reverse course. ****_Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks._ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122551024/592829282/1027836889?s=46&t=Dj7-Y210GYDWXG21xFaxCQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MWMyOThlOC0yY2U4LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5IwCj8dbVVkqzuxnxYAGS8zBrvHp_gRet_BUh_okBMk=&emci=ed0f6997-27e8-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=71c298e8-2ce8-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=4925535) Statehouse Democrats are leading the charge to expand access to the Indiana Dunes State Park. The Dunes, along with its federal partner, the Indiana Dunes National Park, mark a major recreational landmark in Indiana and the most visited park in Indiana. Sen. Rodney Pol (Chesterton) and Sen. David Niezgodski (South Bend) have written to the Indiana Department of Natural Resources supporting the study of a second entrance at the park. Access to our beautiful parks should be a priority. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122551025/592829283/-1594520854?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MWMyOThlOC0yY2U4LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5IwCj8dbVVkqzuxnxYAGS8zBrvHp_gRet_BUh_okBMk=&emci=ed0f6997-27e8-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=71c298e8-2ce8-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=4925535) Join our campaign to hear from Hoosiers across Indiana who are struggling with higher prices on essentials, including groceries, healthcare, and more. clean_body: | Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important facts - a kernel of truth - from the week. = ** Happy New Year from Indiana Dems! Happy New Year from the Indiana Democratic Party! 2025 was a year of ups and downs. We saw terrible policies come out of the Republican majority in Congress and the Braun supermajority at the Indiana Statehouse. However, it came with many wins as well. Together, we elected new leadership to our state and local parties, and stopped the redistricting scheme from redrawing our congressional maps. Hoosiers, you stood up and showed the world what we are made of. Let's take that same energy into 2026 to change the leadership of our state. Governor Braun Denies Summer Meals for Hundreds of Thousands of Hoosier Children Paid for by Feds Governor Mike Braun’s administration has become defined by its cruel cuts to vulnerable Hoosiers. This week, the Governor’s administration added to it by announcing it will not participate in the federal summer meals program for 2026. This is cruel blow to over 500,000 Hoosiers who would’ve qualified for the program. They cited costs as the reason, but the $6 million price tag on administrative costs is an amount the state spends every hour. There is ample room in the budget for this program, and it’s time for the Governor to reverse course. Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks. Statehouse Democrats are leading the charge to expand access to the Indiana Dunes State Park. The Dunes, along with its federal partner, the Indiana Dunes National Park, mark a major recreational landmark in Indiana and the most visited park in Indiana. Sen. Rodney Pol (Chesterton) and Sen. David Niezgodski (South Bend) have written to the Indiana Department of Natural Resources supporting the study of a second entrance at the park. Access to our beautiful parks should be a priority. Join our campaign to hear from Hoosiers across Indiana who are struggling with higher prices on essentials, including groceries, healthcare, and more. We have partnered with the video collection service to collect the stories of Hoosiers on this important issue. . Information on County Party events, Town Halls, protests, volunteer opportunities, and more can be found on our Upcoming Candidate Trainings Join the National Democratic Training Committee on Thursday, January 8th from 1-2 pm ET for a free virtual live training on So You Want to Run for Office. INDems IN the News IndyStar: FOX59: WRBI: * Louisville Public Media: [content goes here] 101 W Washington St., #1110E Indianapolis, IN 46204 Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www.indems.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

| | | High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.

Nancy Mace wasn't born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she's gained.

At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts.

By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch. She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina's legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground. Now, she's running for Governor of South Carolina.

Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who's walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she's been one of President Trump's fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left's sick agenda dead in its tracks.

She's not here to make friends. She's here to make history.

Nancy is fighting to:

* Eliminate South Carolina's Income Tax--the highest in the Southeast

* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency

* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free

* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate

* Reform education so students learn how to think--not what to think

* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she's ready to do what she's always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front.

South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.

At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch. She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina's legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground. Now, she's running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who's walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she's been one of President Trump's fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left's sick agenda dead in its tracks. She's not here to make friends. She's here to make history. Nancy is fighting to: Eliminate South Carolina's Income Tax--the highest in the Southeast Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate Reform education so students learn how to think--not what to think * Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she's ready to do what she's always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started. | | | | | | Paid for by Nancy Mace For Governor | | Copyright (C) 2025 , All rights reserved.

clean_body: Peter, Unfortunately, today's universities would rather cling to a radical DEI agenda than lower costs, protect free speech, and improve education. That 's why the Goldwater Institute's work is more important than ever. And we don't just talk the talk. Through our in-house legal team and pro bono network of attorneys, the Goldwater Institute brings cases that force transparency, dismantle unlawful DEI programs, and defend the constitutional rights of Americans in all 50 states. We draft policy proposals and turn those proposals into legislation, challenge universities in court, and directly confront government overreach when bureaucrats try to silence students and families. We have you down for $46, Peter. Right now, the left is trying to hide its DEI practices. They're rebranding it, rewording it, and figuring out how to keep it in the classroom. At Michigan State University, for example, a recent report exposed that future employees are required to take courses packed with radical, left-wing indoctrination. And it's not just professors: students are being forced to comply in order to earn their degrees. This is exactly why the Goldwater Institute exists. We don't just write reports or talk about the problem. We draft legislation, challenge universities in court, and DIRECTLY confront government overreach. We are the ones pushing back when bureaucrats refuse accountability. We are the ones suing when universities defy the law. We are the ones restoring merit, freedom, and constitutional standards to American education. Every dollar you give will directly challenge universities that defy transparency and accountability, stop DEI-driven policies, protect students, and restore our constitutional rights.** This is not a short battle, Peter. The left's march through our institutions took decades... and reversing it will require resolve, strategy, and committed patriots like you. So here is my direct invitation to you: Thank you for standing with us. Sincerely, Victor Riches President & CEO Goldwater Institute The Goldwater Institute is recognized by the Internal Rev |

name: Gina Hinojosa HQ
subject: Unlike Greg Abbott…
body:
Our $43 average donation is reflective of our community.
# [](https://ginafortexas.com/?refcode=em_ms_gh_header)[](https://ginafortexas.com/?refcode=em_ms_gh_header)
**$43, Peter.**
That’s the average donation we’ve received since we launched this campaign last year.
Unlike Greg Abbott, Gina doesn’t call up right-wing billionaires to bankroll her campaign. She turns to people like you: supporters investing in our future, $5, $10, or $43 at a time.
**[Peter, will you donate $43 — or anything you can give right now — to support Gina?](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260102_1_average.nFYL79&refcode=em20260102-360&amount=43&t=1&akid=360%2E299639%2EsDfqFL)**
**Gina Hinojosa has never been for sale.** She’s running for Governor to continue the fight for working Texans — to create jobs and bring down costs, fund our public schools, protect our freedoms, and take on the special interests that have bought their way into the Governor’s Mansion for far too long.
Gina can win this fight and help build a better future, but only with our continued support.
**Our $43 average donation is reflective of our community.** It comes from teachers, nurses, parents, and Texans who are tired of corruption and ready to take back our state.
We need you on this grassroots team, Peter. **[Contribute $43 or any amount right now.](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260102_1_average.nFYL79&refcode=em20260102-360&amount=43&t=2&akid=360%2E299639%2EsDfqFL)**

Thank you,
Team Gina

name: The Latino Vote
subject: 2025: A Year in Review. And Who to Watch Out For in 2026 | The Latino Vote Podcast
body:
The Latino Vote Podcast Season 2025 Finale: The Year Everything Shifted: Latino Political Power Surges as Trump's Approval Craters | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/latinos.vote/podcast-season2025-42-8346243?e=5bd167f239)

| | | [ ](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=cd9234d77f&e=5bd167f239)

|

| |
# **[2025: THE LATINO VOTE UPRISING](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=8345e07e4e&e=5bd167f239)**
---
| [ ](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=5d25fbc909&e=5bd167f239 "The Year Everything Shifted: Latino Political Power Surges as Trump's Approval Craters")
---

_**The Year Everything Shifted:**_

**Latino Political Power Surges as Trump's Approval Craters -_And What to Watch Out For in 2026_**

The Latino Vote Podcast - 2025 SEASON FINALE
| _In the season finale of The Latino Vote Podcast_, Chuck Rocha and Mike Madrid take stock of a political year that reshaped American politics — **and put Latino voters squarely at the center of what comes next**.

>From Trump fatigue and collapsing approval numbers to redistricting battles in Texas and California, Chuck and Mike break down why **2026 is already shaping up to be the year of the Latino voter**. They dive deep into critical upcoming primaries including the **Texas Senate race between Talarico and Crockett, the emergence of young Latina candidates like Eva Lopez Chavez in Utah's new district, and the need to elevate Latino voices across the political spectrum.**

With a surge of Latino candidates running in unexpected places like Utah, Michigan, New Jersey, and Pennsylvania, **2026 will be the year we build lasting Latino political infrastructure nationwide**.
---
|
### _A huge thanks to all of you, who tuned in to the Latino Vote Podcast this year. Your engagement, support, and passion for Latino political empowerment have made this community what it is. Remember: 2026 will be the year of the Latino Voter! Choose Love over Hate.

See you all next season!
\- Chuck, Mike, and the Latino Vote Podcast Team_
---
|
---
| | | |

¡Bienvenidos Todos!
The Latino Vote Podcast brings together the most sophisticated Latino voices in the country to provide you with insightful, accurate, unbiased, and timely information relating to the voting patterns and inclinations of the Nation’s Hispanics.
[**CLICK HERE FOR THE LATEST EPISODE ON APPLE PODCASTS**](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=fac71cd34c&e=5bd167f239)

# [**ORDER
THE LATINO CENTURY**](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=12fffb3d35&e=5bd167f239)
[](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=a0c0815fcc&e=5bd167f239)

An insightful investigation of how and why the two major political parties have failed to appeal to the Latino vote—the second largest ethnic voting group in the country—and the impact it will have on American democracy and politics for decades to come.
[**ORDER IT ON AMAZON**](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=2911678fc9&e=5bd167f239)

Tío Bernie**](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=120d97e325&e=5bd167f239)
[](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=c267d49328&e=5bd167f239)

Four months after the end of Sen. Bernie Sanders' groundbreaking 2020 presidential campaign, Senior Advisor Chuck Rocha publishes his debut memoir “Tío Bernie,” a chronicle of the historic Latino outreach program he pioneered.
[**ORDER IT ON AMAZON**](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=882292b2aa&e=5bd167f239)

name: Mandela Barnes
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mandela for Wisconsin
body:
I am so grateful for all the grassroots support we have received
| Hi there, this is Mandela Barnes. I wanted to take a minute to say thank you and wish you a Happy New Year! I am so grateful for all the grassroots support we have received so far during this campaign — thanks to you, we reached our end-of-year fundraising goal. That means that we’re heading into 2026 in a strong place to fight back against the MAGA dark money that will be pouring into this race. Billionaires like Elon Musk have tried to buy our elections before, so we have to prepare for them to double down this November. My campaign is supported by grassroots donors, not dark money billionaires. Our democracy shouldn’t be for sale, and that is what I am going to be fighting for as your next Governor. If you haven’t had a chance yet to chip in to our campaign, you can use this link to keep up our grassroots-powered momentum: [secure.actblue.com/donate/mb-em-fr-jan26](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mb-em-fr-jan26.E30PSJ&amount=15&refcode=MB_EM_FR_010206_B1_ThankYou&t=2&akid=5756%2E196590%2EA2ioC8) Thank you for standing with me,
Mandela Barnes

Peter, I didn't learn loyalty in a classroom...
I learned it when the only thing between me and death was the man next to me, bleeding, praying, holding the line.[](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/X8eIWZRtuB8zAKrwRwXbCrqq7Ed7eqLj4hyizN6wULdjq_lxf30QTkAw16Zx2dj725dMoB-rcPalX1MQMNMOnVePOJzYSJJB50cb2oHcDHMOjxSJSvUneVGnGO8eTStTzgDUNAhpq-azPV0t3Jz07-K2v8a5Dhy7WllVjgC2LRzkmGFBxyUVm35EolInfIcWyktlqcHjC3x4M14akz8m1UVjct8mQiFHSbMkK6lafz3R2ZJotuk8DChaPk1KvHWlTeDZrc9v8unXX8N-VU_RJeGMsN74GQ1rj-9af6z2IHZWDEKOut3b1BB9Y_hYeJgpk-j-LndzL4VfDsb14aiDMhKE84-gLPZLu3XcEihfG-9JJuS1882iyFMD3qVR_LL2xzHbaVYyAyYeFAtOWMqp1NgfWXFSAMBa5_tVa99WAgNh-hYEA6NsBpKSsfJisbq0HFuG_xhViQWRH_xKWvYyYBRezuHI7EOtcbijVyWC1tX3K9PylX5z8bH2UkItv6mTHcnuUAff6iRTkNL1mVmdnhO9fFIGCxh9nn7Ek38T0nkguVdEcycrFbW8vGccxdIrzp9vnEuB-CPb3Swmf_nqfyvKtEysJxdObz06FWIvQ45UZBAOy6lqyEU4XSo-fp_yMyuO4b4T0OeGSjvnNfOXubWDlC4aFvvE-1WxKeCzF9AAX4PBOoXhyR7Ud4fJLmgS569NfHUHbxBmBNQVJ4GCHYL2vHyE4QyJk25QZEf1tDiaK8nqJI4gs3uYR3AP3zCBzDJp4KUskhnCY8mF7F70VSbER7gIMiNXpn2UOEwyvLNWNWB3rCAGAPrHx3b5Bs5W00diqu87-bODKLubrX9eJoDorZAfpzDtqNP1wGbvpbxNlRcwN_ZF8_SsKHezwey8A0ntu34QJvogDaY/Az4xYa_LBTk2BldI_C3CE_fkc5n9K6QA/16)I was a Navy SEAL sniper. I've seen men carry each other with bones broken and breath shallow, because the mission didn't care how tired you were.
That's where I learned what brotherhood means.
And let me tell you, Peter, DC doesn't run on that kind of loyalty. Up here, it's traded for likes and lobbyist dinners. The cowards trying to flip this seat in '26 have never bled for anything in their lives.
But I have. And I'm still standing.
That's why I'm building something no pollster told me to create: A GOP Veteran Defender Membership Circle.
This isn't for donors. This is for fighters.
Just 20 names. Each one represents someone I can count on when the fire comes. Patriots who still believe in faith, grit, and country, and refuse to let the Left erase our flag or take down Trump.
Right now, I have 14 names.I'm holding the last 6 spots for those who've earned them.
And, Peter, I had a chance to look at your record and you DESERVE IT.
[So, If you’re still in this fight... if $5 or $10 won’t break you... then I’m asking: Peter join us, and claim your Defender Membership before 11:59 PM:](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/kaurjAzHEZ9g29rKINTIj9OupAp1oPzm2AWhcysWvEa3H7_EQ2j3lKyBdv7Sq3JDoo8xmMtWdWeQRjBBkFXkVojJfpDF_wfA8exCJaUmJspa4vKVt4WWZPDatNA8UXdU3geNEpAxCRo9EqbmhVj34G6HrPCq10Pz8E5bO0cpgOTWywbIEVGg1hB5DOBYE3Qp4qSfkQbWEIt6Gmfg42Tq0dn795gC2aaxNHukotsEKduGJ-TMsMwAkbj94DDeiSi2ZYVyGhA3ejzm5yMGQzGWQ3te7mRvVIHNQ5u_vWw83vLAKInmbEUFTDkB1T9oB1najXAXoxgmOxce1pG2aNu1uvOQj24H6l1E6Rd7-hMESULXwhdST5ODC7frSmJ7yewzmft99EkX4UfagqEtwU0l56M4UBjFPUBrUWL-1R5BtpAVmdJX2KzvMJpeNBV-SMelKeExCYP_NOX-Q-Xa9annmkUI-pBpOh7wGiDZ3oy5IyuUx3QfpeiM9kXOeM5qKx6rs43Leh9MIWynzZNUOCwfkGQoZvoh7uD5rm9mCv5_4YGU2_GgR0eughJiB5XroDMBXx0BzMe-cLO9FK-VjZQOL4CoBYtMjpa5onG5kuslDpTAwjOotANtlu7n2Mvxlq6oIjsE2cJUI0aeFHUzG4K_XSijj43x8QB9lrvZw3ARaTXABm7ZrsrrUXk1oF1QhYQ1Rzhtqiy42va-cRihjHcdF84uTdNWMT1pgm4MmU21DxYa_vulYryEm3T5gtdYWtg0YlVA8nil6xSJjhGFrvTB89E4g_xgs0j0Psy7kS4YSbqfU5y5Khft1VjppGNA5iBGSTfmDL_vgCyIHVUUUwMSjM3zClMekdGV9uhtxA3MgKUcawp2HF2TzDp37sQrgZTmq1j1C77jtN_bQEU/DqsYNE9Yjmb4dqfE1xYQ1e1Lqj3EoqGd/16)[DON’T WAIT: Peter

name: Deb Haaland
subject: Thank you, friend 💛
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO**
body:
It wouldn’t have been possible without your support!

| | | [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/134?t=1&akid=6566%2E400544%2E_RFOEX)
---
Team, I wanted to send you a quick note to express my gratitude:
Together, we not only reached our December goal, we blew it out of the water! From reading our emails and texts, to answering survey questions, to contributing what you could, every single person helped make this possible. You showed that this campaign is a real grassroots movement, ready to win and bring real change to New Mexico.
As we begin 2026, there could not have been a more important moment for us to reach our goal. This election will be close, and with another self-funded multimillionaire entering the race, it's clear that the GOP is ready to spend _anything and everything_ to buy this seat.

But with our continued grassroots momentum, we are ready to fight back.
I am so thankful for you, friend — and all the members of our team. I appreciate you!
💛 Deb
P.S. We have a long road ahead until Election Day, and I’ll need your support to continue reaching every person in all 33 counties in New Mexico. This grassroots campaign is powered by the people – and that includes you, friend. **[So I have to ask: Will you make your first 2026 donation to our campaign today?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/3321?t=2&akid=6566%2E400544%2E_RFOEX)**
|
* * *
| | [Donate >>](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/3322?t=3&akid=6566%2E400544%2E_RFOEX)
---
| | [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1102?t=4&akid=6566%2E400544%2E_RFOEX)
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
[**Receive Fewer Emails**](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?&t=5&akid=6566%2E400544%2E_RFOEX)
[**Update Your Information**](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/?&t=6&akid=6566%2E400544%2E_RFOEX)
[**Unsubscribe**](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?&t=7&akid=6566%2E400544%2E_RFOEX)
Email us: info@debhaaland.com

name: Haley Stevens
subject: Believe it or not
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
This will set the tone for the entire year.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1810%2E49239%2ERDqIuF)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11166?t=2&akid=1810%2E49239%2ERDqIuF)
---
Grateful, null.
That’s how I feel when I think about the grassroots movement we’re building here in Michigan. Thanks to supporters like you, I’m the only Democrat in this race consistently polling ahead of MAGA Republican Mike Rogers – and our momentum is growing stronger every day.
But now that we’re officially in an election year, _we have to crank it up a notch_. **Believe it or not, the resources we raise now – not months from now – will have the biggest impact on our ability to keep Michigan blue and take back the Senate this November.**
**[That’s why I just set a goal to get 25,000 folks to become 2026 Founding Donors of our campaign by Monday at midnight, and I’m personally asking you to be one of them. Will you chip in $5 or more today and have my back in this fight?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11189?t=3&akid=1810%2E49239%2ERDqIuF)**
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11189?t=4&akid=1810%2E49239%2ERDqIuF)
Last election cycle, the GOP spent nearly $80 MILLION to try to buy Michigan’s Senate seat, and they almost succeeded, losing by just 0.34%. This time around, experts are saying that our race could be the most expensive in Michigan history.
I’m no stranger to tough fights, null. **But the truth is, it’s going to take serious resources to compete with the GOP, fund everything from our critical voter outreach programs to our TV ads,_and win_. And I need your help.**
[**Whether we reach our Founding Donor goal will set the tone for the entire year. Will you chip in $5 now to activate your 2026 Founding Donor membership so we can keep Michigan blue and flip the Senate?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11190?t=5&akid=1810%2E49239%2ERDqIuF)
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._ | | | [Donate $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11190?t=6&akid=1810%2E49239%2ERDqIuF)
---
| | [Donate $25](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11191?t=7&akid=1810%2E49239%2ERDqIuF)
---
| | [Donate $50](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11192?t=8&akid=1810%2E49239%2ERDqIuF)
---
| | [Donate Another Amount](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11189?t=9&akid=1810%2E49239%2ERDqIuF)
---
Thank you so much.

Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11171?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=10&akid=1810%2E49239%2ERDqIuF) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11172?t=11&akid=1810%2E49239%2ERDqIuF)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley
